Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was awful tiny sink the size of a A4 sheet of paper with no plug a brick wall for a view not what you would expect for 275 per night Very dissatisfied   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Beds were comfiest i ve ever slept in location was great straight across from Hyde Park close to Notting Hill Portobello Market Knightsbridge Harrods and about 12 uber ride into Soho Staff were great very helpful Rooms had everything you could need

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We were assigned to a room on the ground floor next to the entrance and it was quite noisy   Delicious warm welcome cookie upon arrival Welcoming and helpful staff Great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: A little more tea and coffee left in your room would be nice   The room was comfortable clean and fresh Location to 3 train stations great Breakfast is the best the feel service and outlook from the Urban Meadow restaurant is fantastic 3 quiet pubs in Moscow rd a bonus especially the Phoenix to top it off for an extended stay there is a helpful laundrette in moscow rd as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: When we arrived in reception at 1 15 we asked if our room was available and if it would be possible to check in a little earlier than 3pm We had travelled a long way and it was very hot The girl on the desk I didn t get her name she had a foreign accent and wasn t working later on was exceptionally rude She answered very abruptly that the room wasn t ready and we almost got told off for asking the question Such a shame as the rest of the staff were nice She was really snooty and not friendly at all Her attitude was basically how dare you ask to check in early and why are you bothering me Queen rooms are tiny fine but tiny

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: As I try to check into my room the lady customer service was eating a cookie while putting me on hold then licked her finger and asked for my personal identification I booked my room in advance since I have couple of client in the area I need to cater to But unfortunately I was given another room because the room I originally booked wasn t available   The location was great easy access to the famous Hyde park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Excellent place to stay with excellent transport links via the Tube With Bayswater station and Queensway station within walking distance giving you three different subway lines you can easily get to any part of London Easy and safe to come back to after a late musical at West End The road Queensway B411 is a nice area with a few really good chinese restaurants Gold Mine and Four Seasons Walk in the opposite direction from DoubleTree and you can walk to Portobello Market in about 20 mins What a wonderful bustling market Beds were comfy Cookie given was delicious Loved it Morning breakfast was ok sufficient But gets a bit boring after a few days as the same food is served all the time stayed for 5 nights Standard hot English breakfast also with cereals muffins breads and pastries Overall highly recommended I ll certainly stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: 1 room windows curtains looked worn not really up to 3 star standard let alone the fact that this was a 4 star hotel 2 room never cleaned throughout my stay 3 no morning tea sachets etc left after check in date 4 noisy air conditioning rattling all night long 5 room quite small for a twin bed layout 6 I have stayed in 4 stars where bath robe slippers etc have been provided this was very basic by comparison 7 definitely not worth 243 per night   1 excellent breakfast great variety very efficient staff spacious breakfast area 2 bed comfortable clean linen 3 close to tube stations 3 all within 3 to 6 minutes walk away and therefore short journey to central London fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The booking in was cumbersome tiring and unnecessarilly time consuming especially after a long journey The admissions desk was tucked away and very small when more than 3 visitors visitors were there at once We were asked for our passports emails etc even though we were obviously UK citizens and it was clear they already had all this information via Booking com A number of the staff we encountered had a problem with English which was difficult at times The restaurant was just a caf really not what we would have expected for a hotel of this status   It was comfortable and well located for our business appointment

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Staff were average expected them to be a little more friendly and accommodating at a 4 star hotel But I would go back   Location was awesome Right next to the park and walking distance to great shopping streets

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Twin beds we expected a double bed No coffee with the kettle which was tucked away in the wardrobe Not everybody likes the specialist coffees and the room was quite small   Lovely clean with air conditioning as it was extremely hot outside

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: waited 30 mins to have an order taken for coffee The room was small and dark One window which over looked a back lane The toilet had water leaking all night which made for a poor nights sleep The bath plug was broken and having a shower just lead the bath filling up No complementary water in the fridge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Air con was poor Inefficient and loud Tiny room for the money Ready made stewed tea for breakfast And tinned peaches that had gone fizzy   Location is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Terrible small handbasin in bathroom that made hand shaving very difficult   Great frontline staff good sized bedroom with comfortable bed Good coffee in room Great location with 3 Underground stations close by

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Left a phone charger in the room by accident Unable to talk to someone that would help passed between departments and still waiting the call to give me update   Good hotel clean and well equipped

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We felt that the staff were a little sombre and unfriendly when we arrived around 1pm at the hotel we were told our check in was at 3pm and we weren t able to go up to our rooms even though our online confirmation stated that our check in time was at 1 2pm We waited about a half an hour until we asked a different person at the front desk and were then able to go up to our room Also the toilet in our room produced a very foul unpleasant stench like sewage which permeated the room and made it difficult to sleep This continued throughout our stay   We liked that the bus stop for London tours was right outside the hotel and the hotel was very close to Paddington station The concierge was very helpful with booking taxis and answering questions about London tours The beds were very comfortable and overall the room was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The air conditioning was extremely noisy and wasn t possible to get it right until the second night of our stay so for the first night I was either boiling or hot or wide awake listening to a noisy air conditioning unit  beds were very comfy and bedding was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing to dislike   All staff where friendly and helpful One staff member in particular was extremely helpful My husband left his credit card in the taxi that just dropped us at the hotel Amare phoned the taxi company and within half an hour the card was returned to the hotel and Amare then returned the card to my husband in our room We thank him very much for the extra care and attention

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Reception staff were extremely helpful and dealt very professionally with some abusive and impatient guests from overseas who demanded priority in making their rooms ready

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: air conditioning didn t work as well as it could Weather very hot and so difficult to sleep   great location room small but adequate staff great Very good breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The mandatory charge on my card of 50 over and above the room fee just in case we used any facility etc this was refunded at check out   The room was to hot and it took an age for the ac to lower the temperature

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Left an item in the room and had to pay for it to be posted back to us in the same country Procedure long winded and had to fill in forms when I would have been happy to authorise over the phone   Doubletree Hilton always provide a warm cookie at check in They are to die for Nespresso machine in room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bathroom facilities looks being compressed but acceptable Only one bottled water but enough to make two cups of coffee No choices of sparkling water   Good location Nespresso coffee Nice view from Level 7 Quite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The Wifi was intermittent in and out  I liked the pillows when staying in Doubletree hotels previously I find the cushions far too soft These were great and I had a fab night sleep The breakfast was great fantastic choice and if I had another hour I would have had more The staff were super friendly and helpful thank you to you all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The staff was a bit mechanical and could have have been more dedicated There are no extra facilities such a nice lounge gym etc The safety box did not work   Excellent location with easy access from Heathrow via Paddington station Rooms were nicely decorated with well designed lightning and comfortable beds that gave good sleeping quality The windows are well insulated from road noise Ok breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room is quite smal but comfortable It would be great to have a safe in the room   Easy access to good Asian restaurants in Queensway as well as Queensway tube station Right across from Kensington Gardens Hotel is comfortable and room overlooks Bayswater Road

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: They really need to buck up with the restaurant 1 One evening at 8 30pm 26 05 I invited 2 people for a drink The waiter I tried to signal to just nodded He passed by again and saw me looking at him He never came up to me But I found out from overhearing what he said to a table of customers who arrived after me that they were not serving any more as they had no personnel He didn t even have the decency to inform me Meanwhile one of his colleagues had the time to come out and take a photo of some other guests So what was that about And might this waiter with the sour face be reminded that he works in the SERVICE INDUSTRY And that PAYING GUESTS are not to be ignored 2 Another evening I went there for a drink with 2 guests We ordered 3 drinks listed on the menu The waitress returned to say that the beer we wanted wasn t available Then she brought 2 bottles of the fruit drinks that we HAD NOT ordered When we pointed this out to her she said the fruit drinks we ordered from the menu were not available But that the ginger beer she brought NOT on the menu was So why do you bother having a menu 3 On the last morning at breakfast I asked for coffee and was served a cappuccino Which brings me to communication In all areas especially the restaurant your personnel could do with a few lessons in English You ARE in England after all   It s location Cleanliness Good front desk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No many restaurants and shops are nearby The room was very tiny the quality of cleanliness was not good restaurant was disappointing   The location of the hotel was great Two underground stations are nearby plus very nice public parks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Only thing we could say is that the choices behind the bar were rather limited   Very relaxed atmosphere great location friendly and professional staff Room comfortable and clean Food good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No problems Booking com There is not a category to mark for simply adult family members traveling together I have to mark Family traveling with children under 18 which is only partially correct in that for us it was Family traveling together no children no partner My adult son treated me to this trip Which category should I mark Thank you   Great location near Hyde Park walking distance to Notting Hill Professional friendly helpful reception staff Very good popular restaurant on site Comfortable room Pleasant three day stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast was okay but it never changed would be nice to have a bit of variety   Fantastic location opposite Kensington Gardens and very handy to tube or bus Room comfortable and has everything you need staff also very helpful Would recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing at all   The location is perfect It is within just a few minutes walk of three underground stations with all the ways you walk along being lively streets There are many restaurants and traditional pubs in the immediate surrounding and many local shops retail chain stores as well Even the shopping centre Whiteleys is around 7 10 minutes walk from the hotel Just opposite the Hotel is the famous Kensington Gardens As for the inside it is indeed perfectly clean which is a big plus Comfortable room including even a Nespresso machine and capsules Staff is friendly and helpful I do recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was a little small price a little high but it s London after all   Very comfortable room large window well equipped room overall good positive experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bed was uncomfortable Pillows were very uncomfortable No decaf coffee in the room Glass used on day one was not changed washed during 4 day stay Cup used for coffee remained in room unwashed over 24 hrs Question cleaning of shower when container dropped in shower was still there after room was cleaned  Staff at check in out were pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Shower over bath might be tricky if you have any mobility issues as the bath is quite high   Super comfy bed block out curtains for a good nights sleep coffee pod machine was handy shower over bath so you had a choice excellent restaurant and only a very short 2 minute walk to the nearest tube at Queensway Lots of buses to choose from on Bayswater Rd and the Hop on Hop off tour bus stops right out the front

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Price was high but I guess this is due to location   A comfortable room good bed general amenities with a smallish bathroom but had everything you actually needed Location is just great I arrived on a bus from Oxford and walked from Notting Hill Gate to the hotel The largest park in London right in front of the hotel and very good public transport to everywhere else

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I didn t think that the public seating areas were sufficiently large There is a restaurant open all day and a seating are with tables and chairs but no other public lounge at least not one that I found Otherwise we both enjoyed our weekend and were comfortable in the hotel Just be aware that there is a Hilton Hotel at Queensway 200 yards down the road and taxi drivers can be confused unless you specify Hilton DoubleTree on the the corner of Bayswater Road and St Petersburgh Place   The hotel is modern clean and easily accessible Staff were efficient and friendly I reported a plumbing problem which was fixed very promptly Hyde Park is very close as is Portobello Road Market We walked into the West End through the park without difficulty South Kensington is similarly accessible and has Shops Museums and of course The Albert Hall The Bayswater Road is a main route and is well served by bus tube and taxis Euston is about 20 minutes by taxi I liked the fact that each bedroom has a Nespresso Machine I was only sad to find a small number of coffee capsules 3 Possibly more would have been available for the asking It certainly led me to the Nespresso Boutique in Regent Street so the product placement was effective in my case

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast wasnt quite as nice as when we have stayed before but they could have just had an off day Had to request tea coffee three times before they brought some and tea should always be brought in a pot not served from a big jug as it tastes dreadful and stewed   Rooms small but very stylish Comfy beds and large walk in shower Proximity to Kensington Gardens a plus for a good walk and only a short taxi ride from Oxford street although you can walk there in 30 minutes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I hated this hotel location staff attitude room interior not even clean they charged me more than my rate and didn t get any refund yet and they said I better book through them not booking com  I hated this hotel location staff attitude room interior not even clean they charged me more than my rate and didn t get any refund yet and they said I better book through them not booking com

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The wait staff at the adjoining restaurant was not the most attentive I also tried to notify the staff of an early check in and never received a response Had to wait hours to check in   Great location and clean hotel All you need for a stay in London Close to two tube stops

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The price I agreed on when originally booking was not honored when we arrived Stayed at two other places of lodging while in the UK and prices agreed upon when booking we re honored To me this is bad business and very dishonest   Very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We arrived back to the hotel about midnight after returing from wembley where we watched the boxing We sat in the hotel reception area looking at our phones looking for somewhere to eat I approached the night reception gentleman and asked if he could recommend anywhere near by that may still be open for food he was very un heloful and said no He then sent another man over to us to ask if we wanted a room at the hotel We felt very intimidated We walked on the high street and found a nexican restaurant ourselves Very suspicious staff whi obviously thought we were intruders   The location was very good Cleanliness was superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The shower curtain was far too long and was dangerous It sat on the bottom of the bath I slipped on this one day We had cocktails at night outside but staff locked the door so we had to walk round into the hotel entrance for the toilet or to order another drink This happened every evening at 11pm   The breakfast was lovely cocktails at the bar were good Room was cleaned to a good standard Staff were nice and helpful and the location is great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Couldn t open window I hate air conditioning only rooms   Well appointed room with fridge and all the usual Spotlessly clean Only bad point air conditioning only as no windows open Quiet location on excellent bus routes A bit far out than I personally would have liked but in itself highly recommended

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing  Staff were super friendly The hotel is as very clean The location was excellent near to the hyde park and many resturants and a metro station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Very nice hotel parking was simple room was clean and a good size The restaurant was reasonably priced with good food The staff were always pleasant and helpful will stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The view from our room wasn t great but we didn t really care We came for a comfortable clean hotel room and that is what we got The outside of the building lacks charm but again the rooms restaurant and customer service make up for that   The location of the hotel near Kensington Garden was great We could easily walk to 3 different tube stations Notting Hill Gate Bayswater and Queensgate This offered a lot of opportunity to get around London via the tube The staff was extremely friendly and helpful I was able to get ice from the restaurant which also offered great dining options The breakfast buffet was also amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Blocked shower and tiny rooms I upgraded my stay to a deluxe though Room also was dark House keeper or someone else of the hotel staff entered the room while we were asleep and that was extremely disturbing and inappropriate Definitely not in my future list   The staff were helpful and very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I asked for extra toothpaste as the one in the set the hotel staff had given me had finished They said they didn t have any and asked that I buy it from outside   Helpful and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Housekeeping is not great Some rooms have bottled water mine does not come with it No room sandals and basic vanity set Room doesnt feel clean not up to Double Tree standard   Good croissant and cookie upon arrival was delicious nespresso machine in the room convenient as there are three tube stations nearby about 10 mins by foot Bayswater Queensway and Notting Hill Gate Helpful concierge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: N A  Everything was great we arrived early was allowed to check in early Breakfast was fab great choice of everything from water juices breads cereals yogurts cooked meats many more Staff was very friendly helpfull Car parking 25 a night which i thought was great where most Hotels are 40 50 a night in London The rooms were great i had a fab view over the city park the showers were fab HOT water powerful they was just like the photos on B COM FREE cookies on check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Reception were mostly crowded with large tour groups Could never get to the concierge to ask for recommendations   Neat clean and comfortable Close to Underground and Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The rooms are a little small but I guess that is London for you no shoe cleaning set provided Can t use the blow drier in the bathroom the windows need some cleaning from the outside breakfast not worth the 12 pounds not much choice   Great location close to tube station right next to Hyde park Well equipped rooms with plenty of sun room service has good value for money prices

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Clean and comfortable room Nice modern bathroom Good location just a few minutes walk to Queensway and Bayswater underground station Also lots of restaurants nearby Kensington gardens is just across the road

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Service in the restaurant was not very good   Great location on the North West side of Hyde Park in between two Tube stations Rooms were clean and bed was comfortable A great value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Rooms were not as per picture and were smaller My wife s shawl was stolen from the room The rooms were not cleaned refilled even after asking At the reception when they asked us how was our stay and I said it was not good they didn t even bother to ask the reason or apologize

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: They forgot to put mugs for the coffee in the room bathroom drain not working properly  The room was really nice and comfortable and the bathroom was great Very comfortable bed and pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: pillows not that comfortable but I am fussy husband had no issues  cosy room lovely hot shower plenty storage fridge friendly staff arrival welcome treat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I like everything from the warm cookie when you arrive to the big and comfy room to the free wifi and the buffet breakfast best o j I had in a hotel for quite some time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We were given a disable persons room which only had a very little corner sink the toilet was a wet room The toilet was a seat within the shower area We had to pay 10 extra for every night for an upgrade to a room to suit to able persons we booked months in advance I am a also member of Hilton Membership No 505945518 I never felt we were treated like a member   The Hotel location was very good we received good taxi service through the concierge however our initial check in experience wasn t the best see comments on Disabled room allocation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No bathrobe or slippers in room Some noise from street but then again London is loud I could not get the internet to connect as it was an unsecure network   Nespresso machine in room Cookie on arrival Great location especially not too far arriving on the Heathrow express from LHR High quality soft and luxurious bed sheets and towels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Restaurant staff were quite slow and needed prompting for more coffee Also seemed to ignore a lot of customers saw several potential customers give up and go away Think you hotel really needs a residents lounge bar something I was very surprised to see was missing Have stayed in quite a number of Doubletree hotels in the past and the lack of that facility was very noticeable   The room was fine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The shower head was broken Perhaps the hotel should do some room inspection in prior to guests check in Breakfast could have been a little more hot   Good service Nicely decor rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The restaurant needs a complete overhaul Don t feel relaxed or comfortable while dinning It s too like a staff canteen No character Like being in a railway cafe It would be nice to have a lounge to relax in and enjoy a drink   Staff excellent In hotel Food good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The pictures of the room on the website should marry up with what you get Smaller than we thought it would be   Staff very friendly helpful attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: didn t like the wooden chairs Not really a breakfast room you wanted to hang about in but it did the job would have liked a bar area for a drink when returning for the evening caf not really appealing for an evening nightcap   good selection and well presented

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: A nice relaxing lounge provided rooms are very small Better supply of tea coffee and milk in room Snacks available for purchase placed in room along with price list   Location Friendliness and helpfulness

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was cozy and quite comfortable Service was also good and most of all the location of hotel is definitely good clerks were also kind I want to stay here next time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Beds extra comfy towels huge food delicious fridge in room lovely extra Staff very helpful n friendly air con spot on all in all a new favourite place to stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: As with most hotels the breakfast is very expensive for what you get   Great location short walking distance from tube stations and Hyde park Room was nicely decorated and very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Heating little ventilation so became hot Cost of parking was a lot 25 day  Breakfast was yummy room was clean and comfortable with hair drying facilities ironing facilities etc Windows do not open so room was warm at times

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We stayed at this hotel for my 21st birthday and it was amazing The staff couldn t have been more helpful and the balcony room was great Enjoyed every second we will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The location is great Very close to the underground and if you like to walk you can walk to the majority of the sites Good restaurants around yet not in the middle of the busiest streets

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room wasn t cleaned properly coffee cups were never replaced Nespresso pods weren t renewed or rubbish removed from the room   The breakfast was superb The check in staff were very friendly and the beds were very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I have very little to complain about I personally prefer home made type jams and more salads than there were Plus each mornin I needed to request olive oil for my salad I had to mix it from the veg offered Perhaps you could leave olive oil next to the veg   Staff were just excellent helpful friendly and perfect to us in every way

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The pillows and the bed could have been a little better  Great location with a tube station very close 3 min walk and bus stop at the enterance of the hotel The staff were so friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Wi fi sometimes lost connection For tall people as with most hotels beds need a bit more length   Awesome location friendly staff and rooms are always clean with daily change of towels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No instructions for coffee machine or air con had to ring reception wait for someone to come up to the room  The bed was super comfy everything spotless

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The coffee cups in the room were used and not clean and the milk capsules were also used and empty I called room service to replace it all and they did right away I must say which was good however it is completely unacceptable to walk into a new room and find dirty cups and used and empty milk capsules   The location is great just in the middle between Queens way and Notting hill areas and their tube stations with lots of nearby shops and restaurants and also just steps from Hyde park The room is comfortable and the staff is great very nice and accommodating I ve stayed there several times before and I would stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The breakfast buffet wasn t great and the staff didn t pay much attention to customers although it was very busy  The bed was incredibly comfortable and the staff were fantastic behind reception Arrived 6 hours before official check in and they gave us a room which was well needed after being up since 3am Brunch in the cafe was also delicious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Would have liked a nicer bar We did not use it because it was very bright with no atmosphere More like cafe canteen decor Nowhere to sit in the reception foyer area   Beds were very comfy and the room was very clean The room was nicely decorated and modern A Nespresso coffee machine was provided as well as a kettle tea and a fridge The bathroom was spotlessly clean We had a room at the back which was lovely and quiet with no road noise Very friendly and efficient staff at check in and check out Fantastic location between two underground stations Nottinghill Gate and Queensway and across the road from Kensington Gardens Restaurants and shops within 5 to 10 minutes walk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Hotel was lovely and staff couldn t be nicer Really enjoyed the stay Location was great very near the underground station and restaurant was also very nice Would love to go back soon

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bin in bathroom hadn t been emptied on arrival Terrible coffee and tea at breakfast   Friendly staff Comfortable bed Great location Good choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was at the front of the hotel and the windows are not thick enough so it was very load had to be moved to the back of the building and then all night there were noises from the fans and machines Iron was dirty Air con unit in the room was incredibly noisy and had to be turned off   The staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Little bit further out of the city centre but there s an underground station about 5 mins away and you can catch a hop on hop off bus right outside the hotel  It was so clean and bright very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Booked by mistake for 2 days Booking com were happy to make the amendment but the hotel wouldn t despite having the discretion to do so Very poor customer service towards an Hilton Honours member   Location and free cookie

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I found the pillows a little uncomfortable   The hotel is well situated 3 min walk from Queensway Stn It is well furnished with great facilities My room was quiet Complementary coffee was great Big flat screen TV Stylish

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The airconditioner was not working properly The reception staff was so rude Also my room was not cleaned as i want Some days they didnt put new towels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: duvet cover inside out both nights only espresso coffee available only one tea bag for both of us heating did not work  breakfast was lovely enjoyed the welcome cookie

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was cold Very little facilities When complained about being put in disabled room member of staff just said it was because the were overbooked Hardly my problem   Staff were friendly but we were put in a disabled room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: absolutely nothing   The bed was extremely comfortable and the air conditioning was just perfect The food menu and service in Urban Meadow was excellent All staff members were polite and courteous at all times

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Some people found rooms too warm but I found it pleasant  Lovely room excellent staff delicious and plentiful breakfast Welcome cookie was appreciated Location couldn t really be better but there are a lot of roadworks at the moment

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: i was very un happy with the stay as we gilt mislaid and paid for a deluxe room and there was not one thing deluxe about it was just the same as any standard premier inn

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Maid walked in at half eight and woke us up reception were poor service no smiles or anything and not helpful at all Annoying that you have to pay a 50 deposit for the room on arrival Paying stupidly high London prices for an above average room I have stayed in a double tree in Milton Keynes for half the price and the staff and bedrooms were far better  Location and bedrooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Small room low ceilings in Mezzanine tract no bottled water in room empty Minibar sheet in bed had stains had to cover it with towel Water did not exit from sink and shower Window did not open Corrected Hilton Honours data sheet in evening but data were ignored for invoice in morning Although night portier promised to slip invoice under door this did not happen I was a Doubletree fan before but this was a miserable and disappointing stay   Good Location nice towels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: It does not have a good bar or comfy seating area to relax Bar does not stay open late and staff are packing up by the time you return from an evening out More of a transit hotel but still good value  Good room with good facilities Excellent location and pleasant staff Good for a short stay where you don t really use the hotel other than a base

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room was very noisy a bit small We couldn t locate the kettle which we later found in the wardrobe The toilet cistern was Abit noises at times   The staff were friendly courteous the bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The info supplied by front reception I was told that the booking did not enclude breakfast although was advertised when I booked to the contra I also was informed that there were other rooms available to upgrade but was not allowed to use my Hilton points and was told I had to pay extra

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No smiles from the receptionists It took them time to find our luggages from the locker room no apologies whatsoever Room had some damaged furniture No water minibar in the room despite the fact we had coffee machine and kettles available  Welcome Cookie Good breakfast and cheerful waiters Location very close to Queensway tube station Very Clean Spacious room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: On arrive white quilt cover was accidentally stained with chocolate and this was not changed for the duration of our stay No face washers in the bathroom No daily bottled water as stated Teaspoons were left dirty Toilet roll not put on holder which was tricky to do   Warm chocolate biscuit cookie on arrival Good choices for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Great location for winter wonderland and Oxford street Tube stations were a couple of minutes away Very clean and well presented room Staff friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No mini bar   We were on the 7th floor and the view overseeing Hyde Park was great Room size good the restaurant of the hotel was good also Near to central line and bus stop just outside hotel Easy to go everywhere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was very hot and needed air conditioning on all night   Great location near bus and tube station Also within walking distance of city centre if you like a good walk Friendly staff very efficient and helpful We had requested a quiet to and this was arranged

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room Facilities Like a hanger for my coat A chance to breath some fresh air A worthwhile breakfast Cleaning the room at proper time and at one go

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Their Porter service was not great I had to drag my suitcases down myself even though they said they were sending someone Also the breakfast buffet was a little disappointing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Air conditioning was tricky to turn off Road noise was noticeable in our room Shower was terrible   Great location Friendly and helpful staff Comfortable bed Decent coffee We managed to leave something in the safe and staff were excellent in getting it to us

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact that room service incurred a 5 surcharge and also surprised that the mini bar was empty Wardrobe space was limited   Location and the actual area of Bayswater was really good Breakfast and staff were very good and actual decor was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I cant really think of anything that I didnt like   As a muslim traveller I was very concerned about the hotel breakfast but found that in its own way the hotel breakfast was very much compliant to my needs in its own unique way Walking distance to Queensway Commercial Area and to the tube Queensway and Bayswater this hotel is really fantastic in terms of location Lots of food especially Halal food nearby here Take your pick The hotel itself is very much what you expect to find from a reputable international brand I originally wanted to stay at other hotels around there but Im glad I didnt as this hotel gave me everything I needed and more No regrets whatsoever and I will go back and stay there for my next visit to London Thats for sure Staff all warm and friendly They even helped me with my late checkout as I had a late evening flight back to Kuala Lumpur for a small extra late check out charge I didnt mind actually bcoz I check out at 6 00 pm actually for additional GBP30 00 Their F B Staff all warm and friendly and after a day or two treat you like they know you forever

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing  Cannot fault this hotel staff went out of their way to make your stay comfortable enjoyable room maid was excellent breakfast scrumptious beds big comfortable taxi there immediately very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The staff was polite and accommodating The room service was good and the bars in the bathroom were quite adequate   For a handicap room the bed was 2 3 inches too high the room was too small for a wheelchair and luggage and the sink in the bathroom was the smallest I have seen anywhere and I am a world traveler

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Staff in the restaurant are rude in the evening not prepared to help make you feel rushed Check in process could be quicker Perhaps look at an online check in system where people can check in and keys are ready for you rather than have to sign 3 different pieces of paper present card to be scanned for room charges even though stated we would be paying cash for anything Staff at breakfast rude and walk away before you finish asking what you want We paid 225 for one evening and didn t feel we go much for our money Different menu is in the room from what you can have in the restaurant We felt confused when going into the restaurant as they had closed half of it for a art class so wasn t actually sure we could go in so we ended up having to go outside to walk round to the other doors to get in as the part joined onto the hotel was the part with the art class in which the teacher had a microphone on so the whole restaurant could here what he wanted them to do very off putting when trying to have a meal and conversation Fresh milk could be left in the mini fridge which was empty rather than UHT in the wardrobe   Front of house staff friendly polite and you feel as if you can ask them questions Room done with Rose Petals champagne chocolate strawberries as requested Free cookies Free upgrade to king deluxe Could leave our bags in the hotel free of charge for the whole day on arrival before check in and also the full day after check out and once you have checked in your bags are brought up to your room for you Clean rooms Hot shower Thick big towels Comfy room Comfy bed Hair dryer provided Coffee machine Tea facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room 766 no pressure in the shower   Hotel is 5 minutes from Queensway Metro in front of Hyde Park which you can cross in 10 minutes walking Nespresso Coffee machine with 3 capsule bed is very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We were asked if we would accept a disabled persons room and to be helpful we did However we were not quite as happy with it due to the very small cloakroom sink and lack of shelving space provided in the shower room wc for toiletries etc We also think a disabled person would struggle quiet a lot in this room to make use of the facilities   The breakfast selections and the very helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Expensive with rooms smaller than on the photos I don t understand why only double rooms have view on the park and none of the twin rooms which is nowhere specified on the site   Location with easy access to W1 Very good breakfast including the area served Quite rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: very good location clean rooms size ok considering it is in London very helpful staff very friendly fast internet which for me is very important

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Recently renovated property where fixtures falling OFF into your hands Obviously need to be repaired Seemed to be forgotten Staff not really carring Restraurant IS boring Big difference in service with its sister hotels

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room slightly small difficult for 2 people to move around get dressed at same time Also only plug for hair dryer near a mirror was at skirting board level so coil being stretched to capacity  Staff all very friendly helpful Excellent breakfast choices

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Poor check of room Bedside and wouldn t switch off A very uncomfortable with little sleep A very small room for money There wasn t any bottled water In room like they normally do The receptionist says you ask for it at the front desk No information on arrival in regard to this To put in nutshell very poor front desk not sufficient attention in regard to room issues Room small Extremely poor value for money Better going a premier inn   Parts of the breakfast and location was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I personally didn t care but the room we stayed at was slightly small Again I didn t mind at all but I could see how maybe coming from the US it would feel small   Excellent location Clean modern rooms Decently priced for London Nescafe machine in everyroom was a nice touch Would likely return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Hair on our bed sheets and pillows Empty mini bar No re fill of milk sugar and spoon for coffee tea on the first day Half of the night menu was not available  Welcome cookie Polite staff everywhere Quick check in and check out Practical location next to tube station and good area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The choice at breakfast was good form cheese and fruit through to a full English The service however was something else The staff were pleasant but every morning felt like we were at Fawlty Towers   Our room was larger than average for London although it was at the side above the main entrance We should have asked for a room on a higher floor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: AFOM was rude and did not honor the late check out that had been offered he also was not prepared to have any conversation about it simply turning his back on me and starting to walk off very unprofesional and poor service particulalry after the service had been offered the Bathroom grout has body fat and orrange staining in it and is not cleaned properly additionally whilst I was in the room on one accossion a house keeper came in which was also not expected or accpetable The breakfast quality has dropped significantly along with the service generally speaking this property is without doubt dropping its standards and the colleagues either do not care or are not being led well  Location is ok the Concierge Bellman is very polite and professional

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I had pre paid for breakfast x 2 However on arrival the hotel had no record of this and I paid again Have sent the booking form and I am awaiting a refund  The staff were very friendly always ready to help

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: booking of a taxi from hotel Booked a taxi for our first night Thursday 3rd November to go to Ronnie Scott s in Frith Street He pulled up around the corner from the venue and told us we owed him 25 I handed him 2 20 pound notes and he quickly said in an abrutpt tone oh I do not have 5 pounds as he handed me over a tenner change I was confused and waited and asked for the rest of the money he repeated he had no fivers and then said what do you want me to do and there is a car behind me just go We got no receipt We didnt let it spoil our night but did mention it to the hotel the next morning We heard nothing back so then mentioned it again on the saturday the day we were leaving The hotel very efficiently and professional dealt with the complaint The driver was spoken to and acutually said he thought the fiver was a tip Anyhow as I say hotel staff from the concierge department were fantastic I dont think the taxi driver will chance is arm like that againl  Our second time here and we will come again and recommend Excellent location opposite Hyde Park tube stations and bus within walking distance Staff are extremely helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Very polite staff made welcome as soon as we arrived Room was spacious and comfortable and had everything we required Enjoyed both breakfast and room service during our stay Location of hotel is excellent right across the road from Kensington and Hyde parks also short walk to 3 tube stations Would stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Rooms r v small Few collection in breakfast No lopy Few other facilities Not that good location  Staff was great Rooms we re clean Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: It was difficult to understand how to control the fan for the air conditioning the night manager came within a couple of minutes of my telephone call and solved the problem It would be good if there were instructions for the air conditioning in the room   The hotel was clean The room was on the small side but was comfy and had everything one would have expected For a couple of nights the size was sufficient There are coffee and tea in the room We were tired when we came and the restaurant had a good range of foods we wanted something small and simple It came quickly and was good Breakfast was sufficient and good The staff were helpful and pleasant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: A very minor issue but out of the 5 nights that I stayed they provided 1 small bottle of water complementary For the other days they didnt provide me water in the room   Nice location helpful staff and clean room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Rooms slightly over heated 25 5 each time we turned the heating down the room service turned it up This is the only negative but hopefully constructive comment l can make   Great location could not really find fault with this hotel Reception staff and accounts staff extremely helpful Rooms quiet and well equipped it even had an expresso coffee machine Loved the welcome cookies I would definitely stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bathroom No plug in hand basin Was that intentional and drainage from shower very slow such that water remained for quite some time   Comfortable bed Breakfast warm and served on warm plates

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: the air conditioning is extremely noisy the maid barged in at 8 30 am we still in bed Reception told me that porter could not come upstairs to help carry bags downstairs as quote the porters are lazy you know so we lugged our own cases I am 70 years old and my husband is 84   breakfast staff kind and efficient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Incorrect billing procedure The room had finger prints all over the wall from previous occupiers of the room   The staff was very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: small rooms noisy aircon  good location opposite Kensington Gardens and in a quiet side road close to Tube station for London standards modern bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Road noise but not a big deal   Great location for the Royal Parks Very friendly and helpful front desk staff Room decor and upkeep was excellent Overall much better than expected of central London brand hotel would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I did not rate our room for the cost involved It was quite small and had fixed windows so we could not open a window at all at night to let fresh air into the room Very poor and very disappointing especially for the cost involved   Staff were very friendly and helpful Good location Breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing   Diagonally across the road from Kensington Palace entrance 5 minutes walk from 3 underground stations Great staff great cafe serving breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast was very expensive 20 pounds person so we went outside   The room was in a very good condition and clean The bed was very comfortable and big We had fridge safe iron and the Nespresso machine was a very nice touch Also the restaurant below was very convenient with reasonable prices Walking distance to the tube 2m

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No water all day from 11 5 30 we were told but when we went back for a shower before our show it was not on and we were advised it would be another hour this was upsetting as after a day walking in London I felt grubby and wanted to dress up for our evening The air conditioning was noisy  Staff very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room size was compact for a DoubleTree hotel We also had to negotiate a short flight of stairs to and from our room Not great having to lift luggage up and down   Good proximity to 2 Underground stations and bus routes

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Everything is excellent Room is new comfortable Location is perfect Staff always provided our requests and provide all we need I would like to prefer again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room quite small Breakfast Almost cold by the time it arrived Fridge not working in room Terrible view   Lovely decor in room Clean and pleasant Close to underground station and Kensington gardens

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: At first when we checked in they charged us a very different rate than what we booked to it was a lesser amount and we asked them to make sure that everything was right and they assured that everything was fine 3 4 days later they locked one room saying that we have to pay around 900 more because they made a mistake when they checked us in Fortunately we did have that amount with us   Location Breakfast Welcoming cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No complementary water The Reception was not responding to our calls   Very comfortable bed and pillows Free Cookie upon check in Breakfast was okay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No slippers no shower cap Dirty tissue under bed Stayed here before you were taken over noticed a big difference in level of quality Breakfast cold and over cooked Lobby a bit disinteresting  Pillows and front staff plus location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Needs better sineage on the street Our taxi driver let us off at another Hilton not the Double Tree We needed to walk a couple of blocks to the Double tree   Excellent location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Needs a sign on Bayswater Street Entrance is actually on a side street and can not been seen from Bayswater My room 567 needed painting badly but was otherwise in good repair  Rooms were nicely appointed Convenient to have a restaurant downstairs The breakfast buffet was ample

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: room on mezzanine required steps to get to Air conditioning not good enough for 31 degree days not that that happens often  Nescafe coffee Machine in room pleasant tree view from room handy for park great cookie reception very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Staff at the restaurant bar helpful but seemed to lack experience Slow service  Location and nice size of hotel Quite and good room size Beds excellent for a good nights sleep

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The hotel had only two eleveators and both stopped during our stay and we had to use the stairs for 6 hours For the next three days only 1 elevator was working and it took forever to use it as the hotel was always busy   The location is great and front desk manager was helpful and reactive to our complaints

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We appreciate Marcos delivering a quiet room as requested Hot chocolate chip cookies upon arrival were a nice touch The concierge recommendations for food Amir were excellent The room was very comfortable clean with all desired amenities Location was perfect very close to two underground stations buses and across from Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: When I asked the concierge if I can smoke in the balcony they told me I can t smoke while in the corner of balcony you can see a lot of cigarettes stumps   The location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Not enough lobby seating There were only two seats in the lobby although there was plenty of room for more   Staff was very friendly and helpful Room was pleasant and quiet Great chocolate chip cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The only thing I found was the pillows were not good for me to soft   The location was excellent the bed was very comfortable Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Getting charged for two spirits 22 pounds and then the bar man saying it was double when didn t ask for  Room and location across from hyde park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The shower drainage was poor but once reported to staff they were going to get sorted   Excellent location about 3 minutes walk from Queensway tube The hotel felt safe was clean and comfortable and the food was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The concierge was not easily available nor friendly When we asked about hiring a ride to Gatwick Airport he offered a company that charges 95 We found an excellent company on our own Blackberry for 56 Also the room and bathroom were rather small but understandable given the reasonable price   The staff at the desk were very friendly and kind They made my wife and me feel quite welcome Also the location was great with Kensington Park across the street

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Cleaning and replenishing of room was not to a high standard Phone in the room did not work There was a general lack of attention to detail   Good location for Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The hotel is not actually signposted from the main road and the main door is actually just off Bayswater Road so we ended up walking about 5 minutes past it  Right opposite Hyde Park so you can enjoy a lovely walk through there close to 2 tube stations for different lines so very accessible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I Paid extra for a room with a balcony and rooms with balconies were only on the M floor of the 7 floor building No view of Hyde Park as advertised Saw only road and buses cars Because I booked through you no upper floor room without balcony was offered Also no HHilton points I need a refund 4 nights were spent in a miserable room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Foreign staff that couldn t understand basic English only one waiter in the bar restaurant   Loved the location staff very friendly Hotel and room was fabulous Breakfast was lovely However the waiter in the bar couldn t understand through a language barrier I had only tried to order a larger and a cider He had to fetch another member of staff to see what I was asking for

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Fire alarm went off one night during our stay and we were all required to stand outside for 45mins no explanation was provided that night or any other day during our stay  Good location beside Hyde Park and Kensington Gardens

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The service was brilliant very clean Oh and the cookies they give at the start are delicious Location is perfect as the tube station is less than a 5 minute walk also the hotel is opposite Hyde park which was a treat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Was disappointed that my booking request for rice milk to be provided was not acted on I specifically advised that I could not have dairy or soya milks and had hoped they would be able to provide an alternative   Friendly helpful staff nice and quiet hotel despite busy location excellent food really enjoyed the caf food late afternoon which set us up for our long journey home

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Tea coffee milk and toilet paper weren t restocked after the room being cleaned on one occasion However a call to housekeeping resulted in a quick response   Nicely appointed room and all staff were friendly and welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Although I had two rooms for ten nights they charged me 500 bound to have my 3 kids in one room When I told them that I don t need extra bed they say the policy does not allow for 3 in the room and you have to take a bigger room   The location is nice Hyde Park is across the street Staff are friendly and cooperative Bedrooms are relatively spacious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Loved it all   The restaurant that is attached to the Hotel provides a great breakfast at a very reasonable price and great service with very friendly staff they could not have been more helpful The Hotel staff were excellent as well thank you so much for making our stay so welcome and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: 1 ultra noisy outdated air conditioning impossible to sleep 2 neighbours banging doors at midnight followed by staff intervention after us reporting our fears that someone may be in trouble which didn t help in fact it s the first time I was insulted by a staff member who having no arguments left just turned his back on me and carried on assembling a baby cot in the middle of the corridor at midnight 3 absent minded cleaners trash not emptied for two days litter on the floor never once did the room had the visit of the vacuum cleaner or the duster forgotten towels on the hangers and cleaning plastic bags left on top of the coffee machine 4 the absence of a toilet brush is it considered a shameful object or a luxury 5 during our stay after all these mishaps never once were we approached by a manager or any staff member to ask if there was any problem or to apologise for the rude and unprofessional behaviour of the furniture assembler Even in London it s too much to pay for so much inconvenience or we were misled the Hilton stood for something better Next time Ibis it will be at least there you know what you are getting   The receptionist Mariana I believe was very efficient and helped me get a surprise gift for my wife The bath towels large and proper for a change The coffee facilities in the room albeit a tad too noisy for everybody s comfort The chocolate cookie was a lovely welcome and delicious Yet the sour taste won t go away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room was not completely made up on arrival No soaps shampoo etc Dining is in a Caf which exactly that a caf breakfast was average buffet was dry Staff were inattentive one couple sitting next to us asked for some water the answer they got was It s over there pointing to the Buffet room They asked again and eventually the person got two glasses of tap water from the kitchen and dropped it down in front of them no there you are or any other acceptable comment from the staff member The two people got up and left The man was using a walking stick   Clean and tidy reception staff very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The bathroom was tiny Water didn t stay in the shower Although large the windows don t open There are voluminous curtains which take a lot of space almost half the window when open Other hotels in London provide complimentary waters we had to pay 2 50 pound for one small water not worth the irritation to guests surely   Location was good across from Hyde Park bus stops close by

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I have nothing bad to report  The staff was friendly and helpful Wonderful location next to park Rooms were clean and nice Breakfast was very good with hot and cold offerings Nice bar and restaurant on site

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I litterally have no complaints if there was one small thing is if the company could badger the adjoining bar to stay open a little later for us night owls however I realise this isn t part of the hotel   This hotel is by far one of the best I have ever stayed in the staff were always available and full of smiles The rooms were beautiful and impeccably clean and you get a delicious cookie on arrival What more could you ask for

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The bathtub not cleaning well always had hair left even after cleaned  Good location A few minutes walk to Kensington garden and Hyde park Kots of restaurant around the area

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The menu for restaurant boring no much different only 2 kind of soup as example  The staff was very helpful and welcom specially when I was sick and I need to go to hospital they where very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The coffee machine was very noisy we could even hear the one in the next room being used   Everything about the hotel was excellent The location was perfect for our stay The hotel was very clean and the room very comfortable and the air conditioning perfect on such a hot weekend The check in was fast with superbly helpful staff Breakfast was excellent a good range of choices hot dishes were hot and plentiful The restaurant staff were fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: it was a little far away from Hyde park  Although the rooms were alittle small they were comfortable the TV had so many international channels that we really enjoyed The bathroom is nice and clean overall clean modern and great hotel but what really stood out was the staff everyone we had to deal with was friendly and helpful ee really enjoyed the stay and yes a great blueberry pancake which we ordered everyday The best part is when they gave us the best chocolate cookie when we checked in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Lack of enough hooks for towels in the bathroom for two people plus dressing gowns Very small niggle   The position of the Hotel The friendliness of the staff nothing was too much trouble Welcoming cookie a special treat

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Hotel has no business center Would very helpful to guests if they provided one or two computer stations and a printer It was awkward to have to e mail front desk so they could print a pages for me I must say they were extremely helpful in doing this for me   Great staff very friendly and helpful Concierges service has excellent recommendations on local restaurants transportation museums and local attractions Love the warm cookie at check in out

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The only thing we can think of was the scrambled eggs tasted strange   Bed really confortable excellent transport links road rather noisy but window kept noise to a minimum We do not recall the room decription mentioning the balcony overlooking the road We may have re consideted an alternative room if it had

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We didn t have breakfast The room was light and airy The bed was comfortable The hotel staff were very friendly The hotel is situated close to a tube station so very convenient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The air condition was quite noisy and difficult to set On a low setting where the noise was minimal it would heat up whereas at a mid setting it was noisy and would keep cooling we went to bed at a 24degree Celsius and woke up shivering with a 21 Oh and with a airplane engine in the room Asked them to fix it but it seems it was difficult to do Otherwise was a wonderful 3 days   The staff were super friendly helpful the rooms were simple but clean We felt we truly got what we were expecting from a doubletree standard

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No space available to have a drink when we got back after show Couldn t sit outside all seats taken in small bar area long queue to be served   Comfy bed Tasty meal

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: As we requested two rooms together there weren t two queen ones available we were upgraded to two kings which was a nice touch The rooms were very clean the beds comfy All of the staff were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I can t really fault anything the hotel provided everything we needed  The location was perfect between Queensway and Notting Hill Gate Tube stations and an easy walk away Very comfortable beds very cleans and excellent accomodating staff Good bars restaurants and cafes a short walk away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Wifi connection too slow for my teenager The TV firstly didnt work at all then when they fixed a fuse it stuck on the Doubletree advert wouldn t show programmes Very limited channels available if it had worked I had a broken plug socket One of the white sheets on my bed had black marks on it My teenager was disappointed there weren t even soft drinks in the fridge which was smelly never mind a mini bar We ordered salmon good pizza but it was Chicago Town that you buy at the supermarket not chef made There wasnt even 1 full roll of toilet paper in our bathroom there was hair in the sink Not impressed in the least Breakfast was ordered in room it didn t come with juice only one cereal bowl for 2 people and no toast NEVER GOING BACK   Vegetarian breakfast good My salmon dinner by room service good Staff very friendly room service waiters and reception

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Rude reception staff this is the 6th and last time i will stay at this hotel At checking in i was told in ab abrupt and dismissive way not to have gueats As i have stayed 6 times previously as a corpoeate customer and hilton honors member this telling off at check in was rude When i fot to the room it was still being cleaned I had just travelled 10 hours to this Another room was given room 766 by a nice staff feom spain Whilst there i left a do not disturb sign on the door and went out and cleaner still entered and did rhe moat basic clearup leaving my bed clothes on the windows and my bed atill crumpled Disgusting behaviour No one in management either called or emailed me to apologize for such bad service The only good service was given by 2 spanish gentlemen staff and ameer the concierge The eastern european staff were giving cold abrupt and dismissive attitude towards me one lady short blonde hair at reception even snapped her fingers at me to move to her side of the counter As my company uses hilton group for events and to stay i will relayy bad reveiws to them and ensure i will never stay at your property again The problem is tou are employing people who come from countries where they are used to running gulags and not intenational hotel chains in the centre of london Bad management and training of staff has resulted in the once excellent service slipping down to the service of a holiday inn Disgraceful and sad   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Windows don t open it was very hot and would have preferred an open window to aircon   The location is excellent Beds were very comfortable overall a very good hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Assigning my room at 11am so that when I came back to check in at 6pm my room was not over sold   After over booking the hotel Sunny and the night manager were extremely helpful and a courteous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: As others have said some staff were totally rude Also our biggest gripe as a party of four having booked two rooms on the same reservation and travelled over 4 5 hours to get to London only one of our rooms was ready on arrival Check in at 2pm we arrive at 2 40 and only one rooms was available The host who had a trainee badge on was rude unhelpful and abrupt No amount of warm fresh baked cookies can make up for surly staff and no room after a long drive When asked how long our room would be she replied maybe half an hour maybe two Totally unacceptable and I will be emailing doubletree directly as well Not the standard you would expect   Good location nice breakfast room was a fair size

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
