Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: 1st night at dinner asked for pint of draught beer didn t have opted for the same bottled didn t have brought different bottled beer of which I don t like without asking me Served my wife s sandwich on a brick rather than bread duly returned Ordered newspaper for next day didn t arrive Poor customer service for a Hilton   Room was small but comfotable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: At the reception when we arrived and I a breakfast the Guy at the desk repeated himself five times that I should have had confirmation His voice and attitude was belittling I eventually told him that I was educated in the UK and lived there for 10yrs and I fully understood him had enough of his bossiness so walked away   I thought I paid in advance for one breakfast only the morning of the 26 3 16 The hotel knew nothing about it promised to contact Booking com and that was it Everything else was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nearest underground on central line closed for engineering works Made getting around a little more challenging  Staff went the extra mile at the reception desk Excellent location close to hyde park and underground Nice quiet room recently refurbished Staff put balloons and cake in the room lovely surprise Bathroom all new too Lovely buffet breakfast pre purchased

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing comes to mind   Nice clean hotel well situated for visiting central London Two tube stations minutes away and bus at the front door Cross the road for Hyde Park Kensington Palace and Gardens Have stayed there several times and have never been let down Good breakfast available

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The shower drain was clogged they sent a man to fix it Rooms electrical equipment differ from one to another our friend s room had a new iPod dock and coffee machine ours were old and the dock was not compatible with new the iPhones making it unusable   A bit pricey but the location was outstanding close to Hyde Park Queensway station was a 3mins walk and London s Big Bus stops right in front of the hotel Good breakfast We found the rooms fairly spacious and tidy and the in room coffee machine was a big plus The staff was helpful they checked me in early at 11 00AM which was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Noise from neighboring room from loud phone calls and coffee machine being used Woke us up in the early hours of the morning  The staff were professional and helpful and the overall feel of the hotel was modern chic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No complaints  The bed was comfy pillows soft and comfortable Bathroom very beautiful The concierge was very helpful Location is great just across the street from Hyde Park I would not hesitate to go back I loved it there

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: They did not commit with my request stated clearly in my reservation through booking the need of extra bed where they charged me more for the extra bed This validate my request and disturbed my budget   Good in general

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The lobby area was cold The food on the menu didn t have much variety No hot soup The place was hard to find and no signs on the main street just on the side If you didn t know there was a restaurant attached to it you wouldn t find it Even the cab driver took us to the wrong hotel There was another Hilton a block away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: London hotels are pricey in general and this was no exception Disliked that only breakfast option was huge buffet priced at more than 25 Local direct dialed calls are supposed to be free but I was charged until I protested Bathtub drain was totally clogged and not fixed when I reported it although apology received at checkout Liked it enough to consider staying again  Newly refurbished attractive liked the location directly across from Kensington Gardens and near Notting Hill short ride via subway into center of town Staff very helpful Super clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: charging for the parking was quite steep for residents   The room was a useful size and he bathroom well fitted out The parking was useful and the hotel is outside the congestion charge zone The restaurant attached to the hotel sold a varied and reasonably priced menu The breakfast was both delicious and nutritious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: There was nothing of significance that I could fault  Staff brilliant from minute we walked through the door anxious to ensure we felt welcome Breakfast excellent choice and well presented Room was a very adequate size as was bathroom Used the on site car park and was able to leave the car for a couple of hours after check out at no extra cost

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Rooms could have been bigger for the price but they were decorated well and comfortable   Location was great Big bus tours stopped right out front of the hotel Within a very short walking distance to two stops for the underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I was paying for the stay for my mom I paid the day before she checked out and when she checked out they asked her to pay again as it didn t say anywhere that it had already been paid they had to wait and talk to a few different people for this to be resolved after my mom insisted that it had already been paid   My mom and grand mother really loved the cookies the rooms were nice and clean The location is amazing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The fipino lady server was kind efficient de dark skinned gentle man was all wonder ful help ful all in all every one who goes past the diana monument should experience THE DOUBLE TREE HILTON experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: There was a bit if a smell coming through the fan in the bathroom   The room was very comfortable well appointed with good facilities The hotel breakfast was very good with a wide range of food available The staff in the hotel were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room was very warm the air con was difficult to control  The staff were helpful the room was clean comfortable the complimentary cookie was delicious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Staff assistance they gave me very bad room while they could offer me some thing better providing that hotel was not full and I did ask for it  Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I thought the bedroom could of been bigger for a Queen room and also there was a stain on a pillow   The Staff were very Friendly and the breakfast was lovely Also the bed was very comfy with a big TV

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing  It was our anniversary and the hotel went out of their way to decorate the rooms for us and gave us a bottle of wine Lovely room overlooking the park thAnk you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The bathroom was a little small and we didn t get our tea bags replaced on Sunday morning  Lovely room and comfortable king size bed No traffic noise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The linens on the bed and the bath towels were a bit worn Might be time to refresh these Free wi fi was a nice amenity but ran a bit slow   The location of the hotel was excellent The immediate neighborhood is not busy or loud at night The building faces Bayswater road and Kensington palace gardens are across the street The property is seven stories tall and runs back quite a way from the street It is close enough to both Notting Hill and Bayswater to have a selection of shops and restaurants nearby I would heartily recommend The Champion a pub just down the street They have a good beer selection on tap and offer high quality food options The hotel is also conveniently located to two Tube stops Notting Hill Gate and Queensway and is a five minute taxi ride from Paddington Station the terminus of express trains from Heathrow The hotel itself is clean and well appointed The lobby is a bit small so not somewhere you d want to wait around for people but that s not a big deal The two lifts run quickly and I never had to wait more than a moment for one to arrive The nespresso machine in each Queen or higher room was a nice touch My room was clean and well tended by the housekeeping staff Front desk staff were friendly and happy to oblige my requests printing tickets sending up extra free bottled water handing out additional cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Everyone was very professional friendly and genuinely helpful The service was really good and it was a pleasure staying here I enjoyed the full breakfast and the selection of fresh fruits I will definitely choose to stay at this hotel on my next trip

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing  Very helpful and cheerful staff Very warm welcome with extra effort made for my mother s birthday including balloons and a delicious birthday cake Very comfortable beds and a good buffet breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The hotel is very expensive for what it is I didn t think the location was great as it s close to Kensington Palace but not much else We spent a fair amount of our trip trekking across the city to get to where we wanted to be I also asked for a good view as it was a surprise break for my husband but I didn t get one   The hotel is modern clean and stylish The bed is large and comfortable and the warm chocolate cookies on arrival were delicious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing  I loved how helpful the staff was with absolutely everything From making sure we were well acquainted with the city to teaching us the transportation system Super helpful and friendly through and through

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: When I went to check in I overheard the receptionist say to another colleague that our room hadn t been checked yet but it would be ok when we got to the room there was no hairdryer no mugs no iron no TV remote and the phone was broken not great when you pay extra for a superior room Poor   The room was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We did not have breakfast Appeared expensive for our usual coffee and toast Cheaper down the road   Plenty of power points in the right places in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Everything was brilliant  It was our anniversary and the staff at the hotel made us feel extra special by decorating our room giving us an upgrade and even giving us a free bottle of wine The room was spacious and very clean The location of the hotel is very central about 2 minute walk to the underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Chaotic at breakfast lots of people walking around with various plates of food etc Buffet breakfasts are always a bit hit and miss We left full cups of tea at the table while collecting some toast and the table was cleared away Then no clean cutlery cups we had to wait some time before more hot drinks were brought to us   Lovely warm cookies on check in very pleasant reception staff Great location overlooking Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was extremely warm and when we turned the air con to cool it down it was rather noisy   The room was comfy modern and quiet Breakfast was great Loved the cookie given at reception it was a lovely touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: One of the greatest stays I have ever had Nice cookies offered upon reception complimentary coffee facilities and water in the room We arrived at 11 00 and they let us have early check in The hotel facilities were wonderful staff was extremely kind and the location was excellent All in all we totally recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Really nice people at the reception in the breakfast room the cleaning lady everyone Room OK breakfast OK location brilliant But the difference make the people there make you feel welcome and at home

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: It would be great if the room is located on the higher floor and facing Hyde Park instead of the hotel parking area  The hotel goes extra mile by having expresso machine in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Small booking desk with only 2 people we waited a while to book in and out   Hotel nice clean and modern with a good size gym Great location for central London and Hyde Park with a great pup just a few doors away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Room was really lovely hotel very stylish modern and very clean Perfect location for central London and Hyde Park Really nice atmosphere Upgraded us and left balloons and a lovely chocolate cake as a surprise for my husbands birthday

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The bedroom was very well equipped with a lovely Nespresso machine and replenishing the capsules was not a problem plus complimentary bottles of water The breakfast was fabulous quality with lots of choice and when we asked if there were any more chocolate muffins the waitress brought a fresh batch one for each of us to our table The staff at check in were extremely helpful and when we requested a fan for one of the rooms found one immediately The cookies on check in were delicious and we were even given some more on check out A really positive experience all round We had champagne afternoon tea in the Urban Meadow and that was also excellent quality and the staff in the restaurant were terrific

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Staff were very friendly and gave us our cookie on booking in and even checking out as we said we had enjoyed them Room services was quick and the facilities were very good Really enjoyed it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: WiFi was VERY VERY slow Shower pressure poor and shower water temp fluctuated regardless of what I did I ordered room service and didn t get what I ordered The staff that handled the phone when I ordered room service could also have been a bit more friendly For the money one would have thought they d give you that personal touch   The room was clean The location was great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Excellent service all round My girlfriend and I took ill on our last night in London The staff were very helpful supplying extra sheets and water in the middle of the night They extended our stay until we were able to travel the next day

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No comment   This Hotel is great for a short stay in London if you re after a great Hotel in a fab location choose this We chose King size room which although not an overly large room was perfect for what we needed The room was very comfy and clean the heating air conditioning was very useful and free WiFi was a bonus and strong The staff are very helpful and always have a smile on arrival they present you with their own warm cookies I declined mine due to nuts but gave my partner two anyway The location of the Hotel was perfect for us as was situated a short walk in both directions to local tube stations and if you crossed the road you were immediately in Hyde Park which was great We even walked from the hotel to Marble Arch and Oxford Street although if you re not one for walking I would not suggest this 30 40 min walk The bus stops were right outside the hotel which also made getting around really easy We would recommend The Champion pub which serves lovely cooked food and atmosphere which is a couple of minutes walk towards Notting Hill Gate station The hotel does have an on site Gym and Restaurant Cafe however we did not use these so cannot comment Overall fantastic stay and will possibly be returning in a couple of months

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: very tiny room not much facilities in the room for a hilton I was disappointed no slippers or bathrobe the hotel is expensive compared to what it offers this is more like a three stars hotel   the bed the hotel is close to the tube Hyde park is in front of the hotel free wifi but not strong

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Very loud air con shower was unclean bathroom was very very small room was cramped too especially for the amount being charged   The staff were amazing Very helpful and attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The address of the hotel in the website is incorrect and misleading and the hotel cannot be seen from the main street I ended up going back and forward on the street until I made an educated guess to look for the hotel in a side street where it is effectively located the main entrance Either the hotel should correct its address or provide more information to the guests on how to find it   Good size room for London recently furnished modern comfortable bed quiet located centrally and good hygiene products

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Great location breakfast good room size good Unusually the staff at check in acknowledged our request for a room on upper floor and away from lift and acted on it Our room was quiet and perfectly located

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Hotel needs to be refurbished  Good location in the middle of two underground ground stations restaurants Hyde Park and other shops The Big Bus Tours and other tour busses stop just outside the hotel Staff are friendly and recommended us where to eat etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Not a big fan of buffet breakfasts but there was a wide choice and the staff would go get anything else   Room bed bath room all excellent Staff exceedingly helpful Selection of excellent restaurants within easy walking distance Wine sensibly priced Speedy coffee shop service Meeting tables a bonus

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bar area wasn t relaxing in terms of seating Smell of dampness in room  Hauling a taxi easy in reception machine Room size good Bar hours good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No heating in rooms for two nights Don t like the cab service given by front desk 40 cost for two miles Told they do not deal with black cab returned in black cab fare 12 50 hotel cabs a rip off

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Dining area not as clean as it could be Just had breakfast in it but floor was not clean as it should be and also some of the chairs had old food stuck to them   Staff excellent Rooms really comfortable well equipped and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Building out of character compared to other buildings in the area Very sterile especially for Double Tree By Hilton standards   great location opposite Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: As always a wonderful stay at the doubletree Location is ideal for exploring Hyde Park and surrounding areas and the beds are still mind blowingly comfortable We opted for a balcony this stay and I would say the views aren t great as this is on the mezzanine floor 1st floor essentially so may not book that again but I would still give this hotel 10 10 That free cookie on check in never gets old either

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: All was good staff lovely and helpful but would have liked nicer bar for drinks unfortunately which looked a little sad and wasn t that appealing  Room was lovely and cosy overlooking Hyde Park could walk to Knightsbridge and was v close to underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: As this hotel is across the road from Kensington Gardens we enjoyed taking an early morning run through the gardens all the way around through to Hyde Park It is conveniently situated and we found getting around London from here to be a breeze Will definitely stay here again when next in London with the family

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The hotels Urban Meadow restaurant Good for breakfast but managed by a rude Australian who ensured that it was empty each evening See photo You can walk 100 yards to a restaurant of your choice where the food is better and not overpriced The staff will welcome you   Great location with easy tube access to the West End and all major attractions A short stroll to Notting Hill and shops and restaurants on yourdoorstep Very clean and with one noteable exception the staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Good bed great shower and tasty breakfast WiFi was fast and easy The location if great if you have time for a walk outside and close enige to the City on Circle line

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The only thing which annoyed me a little is that they took a deposit off me which I guess was for room service or the bar or facilities which cost something however this wasn t stated that they would take this deposit before we got there the other Hilton hotels we have stayed in have never asked for this now I m still waiting for the money to go back in my bank from nearly a week ago But overall it was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Lovely hotel Close tube to everywhere Gave us 3 complimentary cookies which makes it a bit extra special Good check out time too and room was ready when we arrived at 10 30 am and no extra charge for early check in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Basic levels of English spoken by staff not a big issue but a little improvement or training in grammar the hardest part of the English language wouldn t do any harm just to help make sure everything is clearly understood between both parties involved   Warm cookies on arrival were a pleasant touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: When checking in I had to wait 4 5 mins for a female staff to arrive When processing my checking in she was not friendly at all on the other hand I felt she was bossy and not respectful I have no intention to complain if so I would have taken her name Unfortunately that s sad   Restaurant staff are excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: It wasn t a very big room Overpriced The drain didn t drain properly Wasn t made clear that they would take 50 deposit either just stated imprint of your card when I booked   The location was good Liked the cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Pillows were too soft  Great location less than 5 mins walk from Queensway tube station and amenities such as supermarkets and restaurants Opposite hyde park and Kensington palace good accessibility

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room was very clean and the bed was extremely comfortable The staff were polite and offered excellent customer service throughout our 3 night stay Tube station is approx 5 mins away and excellent walks through Hyde park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Didn t like service charge on drinks plus quite noisy from room on our floor  Loved the location staff very nice Breakfast was excellent really enjoyed on both days

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I thought the place was a little difficult to find especially when driving a car on a busy road  Staff were really good and helped as much as they could Room clean and was everything i expected

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing But the car park did not have plenty of room to manoeuvre and the breakfast was a bit pricey  Everything Especially the location and the breakfast the bed was really comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Having to pay for breakfast when all we wanted was a bowl of cereals We suggest a continental breakfast option for half the price   The location is superb for London buses and trains

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The value of money slightly high and the beds are 85 comfortable   Overall excellent hotel and location The hotel 3 minutes walk from Queensway underground station and 3 stations away from OXFORD STREET The staff all over the days are excellent happy supportive and smiling The King room is excellent bigger space not like othe hotels in london occupied with expresso coffe macine and nice and a big LCD TV in the room Highly highly recommended prime location hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The balcony was full of cigarette butts and the room was smaller than I expected   I liked the bedding as it was very soft The balcony was nice being a smoker

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: very small rooms the hotel upztairs is old ans not renovated The price for this kind of room was very high Cleanliness not the best Sink was stuck and water could not come out  friendly staff goo location near subway stations and bus stops

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Tv in room was on a sidewall next to a bed rather then on front and we found a bit uncomfortable to watch dryer wasn t in bathroom poor selection of bread on breakfest  Very friendly staff good locations comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Just felt that the plants on the table s attracted flies   I liked the warm and friendly greeting you got from all members of staff and been given a bright room over looking the front as requested

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No relaxing lounge with comfy armchairs settees no where to chill out in comfort have a little peace quiet Pretty clueless reception staff Overcrowded slow service Bar Restaurant more like a noisy staff canteen with ridiculously overpriced drinks even by London standards Poor value poor quality breakfast Located right on a busy noisy main road with poor sound insulation  Nothing much really I have stayed in better Travel Lodges If this is a typical model of a Double Tree Hilton then they need to go back to the drawing board

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Staff at the desk wasn t helpful and I have to remind them to do some simple paperwork But generally they are professional and good at what they are doing   Hotel favilities are new and in good condition It is just 5 minutes walk to a tube station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Despite paying for breakfast we were challenged both mornings as it wasn t showing as being booked This was despite us raising the issue after the first morning and was very embarrassing   Room and bathroom very clean Close to Queensway tube and some very good restaurants nearby Breakfast all nice and fresh

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: We went for our wedding anniversary the staff were very welcoming and friendly The hotel left a bottle of wine in our room for our anniversary it was a lovely surprise Everybody was lovely and so was the hotel Breakfast was well worth it and we had afternoon tea in the hotel that was really nice too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The hotel was noisy you could hear people chatting and walking in the corridors from inside the room Defiantly not value for money   Was in a good location decent size room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Tea coffee facilities difficulty working out how to adjust thermostat Hairdryer cord a little too short  Friendly Staff Prompt service Great bedroom Even better bathroom Delicious welcome cookies Complimentary chilled bottled water in the bedroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The sound proofing on the room was terrible Every conversation going on in the corridor could be heard clearly in our room We were given a room close to the elevator so we had to endure being woken up every night by loud people returning in the early hours   Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I don t like all the smokers standing in front of the door   Great cafe for breakfast very helpful staff comfy and warm beds water bottles in room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The plants on the tables in the restaurant These were outdoor plants and should not be kept indoors There may a risk of insects on the plants   Location lovely clean room and comfortable bed Staff were friendly and helpful especially on reception Food was good especially the 3 cheese pizza Breakfast was excellent lots of choice and tasty

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: room was very cold when I entered my room was not cleaned properly the day after my clothes were hanged up wrinkled there was no water to drink on 2nd day tea product in the room was poor  location breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The WiFi is terribly weak There are no other negative comments   We enjoyed the convenient location We also found that the hotel is modern Mostly we found the staff to be very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: A bit far from London main downtown area The carpet in the room I prefer hardwood floors   The breakfast food and the honesty and very helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: It s not a dislike but having a washing machine and dryer on site would have been good they have a laundry service but very expensive to use  The staff absolutely make this place what it is The are so attentive and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Really friendly and helpful staff My son loved the warm cookie on arrival Brilliant transport links perfect base for exploring the city Would definitely recommend and use again on a return trip to the city

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The room size is London style A bit too small for my liking However I loved that they had a Nspresso machine in the room   There is a bus stop right outside the hotel and the tube station is a five minute walk away The location is absolutely superb The staff and very helpful and friendly and upon check in I was upgraded to a King room free of charge I would definitely recommend this place for a short stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Always a really wonderful stay great location wonderful rooms the comfiest bed I have slept in and the warm cookie on check in makes it every time

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The hotel is well located with easy access to public transport There are lots of good eating places within walking distance The staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The guy serving behind the bar at night seemed a bit pissed off on both evenings we were in there   Reception staff very friendly Cookie was a nice touch so was the coffee machine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Only issue air con blower a little aggressive small point and not a real problem  Staff extremely friendly and polite Room well equipped and very clean Good location and beautiful view of Hyde park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: There was on one thing There was a mark on the bedding that was left from my partners make up which we thought they would change However all they done was to turn the sheets around so we didn t see it anymore unfortunately   Loved the location Was just a short walk to the underground Hyde park a stones throw away and the hotel had a very modern feel to it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Nothing apart from not having a view which to be honest was not an issue unless you WA to be really picky  Service helpfulness location facilities breakfast cost value for money

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bathroom was tiny walk in shower had a curtain instead of a door as room was too small to accommodate a doo practically had to stand on the curtain to stop water running out onto the floor Would definitely check the size of bathroom before booking again   Staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Location hotel is opposite Kensington Gardens not Hyde Park rooms small very basic clinical reception area house keeping needs to be tightened up   Nespresso coffee machine in room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Well my room was not good but staff were keen to sort which they did although it meant me walking everywhere to inspect which was not good as I was on crutch  Staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The service of the staff at the breakfast and during dinner was really slow not very friendly and willing to help Though we stayed in a nice room with a king bed there was no room to move around no chair and small table to place a coffee and sit to relax The loby of the hotel has no sofas where one can sit and relax or wait for friends   Very convenient location especially when travelling with small children The hotel was very clean in all areas especially the bedrooms and had very comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I had a King room and it was a bit smaller than what I was used too but it didn t affect the comfort level of my stay  The staff in particular was lovely especially those at the front desk They were very accommodating and inviting

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bathroom is small and uncomfortable Water will splash everywhere and once you have taken a shower you would not like getting there again   Good access to busses and tube stations as well as walking distance to the Hyde Park and Notting Hill

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast was very simple English one Nothing wrong but nothing special   Close to central line tube station and lots of restaurants in Queensway It was clean room with enough space and facility

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Why when you charge 250 for a room without breakfast you then have the cheek to charge extra for WiFi Toilet has no extractor fan Tea and coffee rather insipid   Location great room quiet despite overlooking Bayswater Road Staff friendly and very helpful Room comfortable Can sit outside the hotel when weather allows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Tiny room even for London Were told there was water in the room but there wasn t and we never received any Requested non feather bedding on booking but had to ask for it to be changed   Quiet room despite being on the ground floor next to a road

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I chose the hotel because of the Location I used to live in Notting Hilll Gate in Pembridge Rd and know the area well I like the proximity to the parks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Once we get off taxi at the entrance of the hotel the hotel staff came out immediately to help When they can t find our reservation the staff brought us to the restaurant and gave us two free drinks so that we didn t need to stand and wait at the lobby

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Recommend change their shampoo suppliers you couldn t get the contents out   Great location can always trust Double Tree will deliver visited them in various cities and always super stay and good value

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Didn t feel that welcoming We waited ages to be served with tea or coffee at breakfast Then had to ask then got it wrong The head waiter did sort out without any fuss the fact we thought breakfast was included but wasn t which was very good of him We simply paid upon finishing   Very clean good facilities on offer

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast on the Sunday morning was poor with long queues and very poor service The food was not of a good quality and not regularly replenished Juices ran out as did fruit and to get a tea or coffee was virtually impossible In addition the waiting staff on the rare occasions that they were seen were inefficient and in some instances simply rude   Location is excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: They need to add extra chairs in the reception area   Very nice place with friendly staff Very clean rooms if i can rate it over 10 i would give it 100 They have the beat coffee ever and loved their welcome freshly baked cookie

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Despite requesting a quiet room I ended in one just next to the corridor s door and all I could hear all night including early night and early morning was doors closing noisy which was very annoying Breakfast service was quite poor as well  Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The price is London like but when special offers are in place this is a real gem   Great room quiet very clean modern and functional All facilities in the room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I can not say that I didn t like but I expect more for breakfast and it was very modest It s not really a full English breakfast that s why if you would like to have a real one please go to the cafe or restaurant   location very close to Queensroad station and just opposite to Hyde Park very end of park And it s just 10 minutes walk from Paddington that is very convinient when you arrive from Heathrow Cookies at reception they are dellisious Very good staff always ready to help you Veiw from our room was perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: No bad experience We booked a twin room for a one night stay the room was very compact I wouldn t want to stay for more than one night in such a small room The bathroom door was only about 18inches away from one of the beds   The hotel was well located for the attraction s we visited Walking distance to Kensington Palace A short walk to the central line Staff all very pleasant especially Sergio Loved the chocolate cookie on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Bad organizing the rooms when chick in the try to give bad sit rooms you have to fight to get nice rooms They keep nice view room for there benefit to sell Because it is non refoundbal reservation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast could be cheaper and bigger But I m being a real nitpicker everything was very good   The location is very good Walking distance of 2 metro stations Notting Hill and Queensway and Bayswater isn t far too Staff are nice the rooms are big and clean stayed in a Queen room and overall we reallyl enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: I used my mobility scooter in London and on returning to the hotel it was easy to ride it to our room Staff put balloons and a cake in our room which was a lovely surprise when we arrived It was my 70th birthday Bus stop right outside the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Cannot fault this hotel at all   A fresh modern hotel perfectly situated for sightseeing without the noise and bustle of the city centre Very precessional and friendly staff who made us feel very welcome Overall one of the best hotels we ve stayed in

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast is only served until 10 which is very early compared to other style hotels extended to 11 would have made our mornings a lot smoother   Great location next to Hyde Park superb staff and quality room with the most comfiest bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: The housekeeping staff need training Management need to have a tighter control over the housekeeping staff   Location Secure parking for car very near to underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Comfortable bed Good service had some documents sent there which we collected on our arrival with no problems Many thanks to the staff and their system

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Was booked into accessible room by accident via booking com Later found this to mean disabled facilities or invalid room Very confusing as to a stranger accessible means able to gain access to As a result my partner and I had to endure a washbasin ridiculously low to the ground and a seat being in the shower The room could not be changed due to non availability of a normal room It should be clear on the booking form what accessible room means ie disabled handicapped facilities preferred Additionally due to being allocated this kind of room we were placed on the ground floor at the back of the hotel and had no chance despite prebooking of a higher floor with a park view   Food location open terrace of bar restraunt

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: firstly breakfast advertised at 12 not the case hidden in the small print is you have to book breakfast in advance to get it at this price and it states this no where on the booking not impressed at all otherwise you are ripped off at 17 50 for one breakfast booked on second morning and got at a price 12 50 not the advertised price on booking website at 12 which is added to your hotel room debit or credit card which again they don t tell you felt pressured to finish breakfast by member of staff maybe felt i was eating too much but at 17 50 i was going to eat as much as possible Also not consistant was not asked if I would like tea or coffee on first morning but was asked on second morning secondly on 2 occasions our bedroom door was opened one by housekeeping when their was no tag outside the door to come in and secondly without any warning heard our door opened and closed again not feeling too safe with this happening   cleanest hotel I ve ever stayed in nice touch with the mini fridge and safe in room bed very comfy and air con was brilliant you can put on and off and left the room lovely and cool if you wanted buffet breakfast was lovely and good choice to eat as much as you like

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park
Full_Review: Breakfast was adequate eggs congealed selection of cheese meats very basic Didn t like being asked to pay a deposit on a credit card against incidental expenditure This can take up to 2 weeks to be reimbursed on card   Good position

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London Hyde Park

Full_Review: Little in anything  Everything was just superb Staff smiley and very helpful without being in your face quality of food at dinner was excellent as expected from this establishment Its first hotel we ve been in for ages where the bedroom was as good as ours at home and that I can tell you is praise indeed Room service spot on time bar staff truly professional

Full_Review: All the staff were very friendly and efficient Beds were very comfortable and the room beautiful My friend and I had a makeover puttin on the Ritz Great fun and the two beauticians were delightful young people Would recommend

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: We have no criticisms at all  The breakfast and lunch were outstanding The staff were warm and friendly without being obsequious An excellent treatment saloon for pedicures and masssge The hotel genuinely wants you to enjoy your stay and goes the extra mile to ensure you do so The hotel manager was helpful and courteous

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There was nothing that I did not like about this hotel it was faultless  Having traveled worldwide this is the most prestigious Hotel I have stayed in just everything was above and beyond my expectations Fabulous

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: the view from our room at the back of the building the bed mattress a bit tired and too soft for our liking  the establishment as a whole the atmosphere of a legendary landmark the staff the quality of the meals the various special offers available making this luxurious hotel more accessible to many

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There was nothing I did not like  In addition to the hotels decor being luxurious from the moment we arrived we were made to feel really welcome nothing was too much trouble to make our stay a memorable one The Afternoon Tea and breakfast was really lovely the service was excellent

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Booked for my mum and her best friend they had a fantastic time and loved every but of luxury the hotel offered for a birthday treat weekend highly reccomend to all

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Nothing could be better   There s no better location in all of London than the Ritz Every great restaurant every hot bar and club all the shopping anyone could want are all near The tea at the Ritz is legendary for good reason The staff is proper not stuffy helpful and thoughtful Compared to all the legendary hotels in London the Ritz is the most for the least

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The service was top notch amazing Coming back to the room after it had been serviced I could only be amazed at how well arranged my toiletries that I had thrown around the dressing table were made I was able to amaze my partner we were there for a birthday Definitely recommend for a special weekend in London

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I am used to a larger availability of choices at a buffet breakfast but the service was exemplary  The service was extraordinary the concierges were amazing and the room was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The rudest staff I have ever encouraged in any hotel in the world I will never walk through the doors of the ritz again They need a lesson in how to treat their guests I suggest they send staff for training at the Savoy A truly world class hotel because the Ritz is clearly posed itself well above the station of of its guests Thinking the staff can treat their guests as second third or lower class citizens They have their whole attitude upside down The Savoy saved me and from there and provided me with the most welcoming and wonderful stay   Nothing

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Bit tired rooms a bit tired with scuffed skirtings and handles missing etc wouldn t have expected this at The Ritz  Lovely classic hotel which everyone should treat themselves to at least once

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Everything about the Ritz was marvellous I have been travelling on holiday with my Dad and this stay at the Ritz for the last night of our trip was a much looked forward to treat The staff are wonderful the room was enormous and so comfortable the bathroom had a separate bathtub and shower with plenty of towels and bathrobes The dinner in the restaurant was one of the nicest I have ever had While the Ritz is very expensive it is so worth it This was the perfect way to end a dream holiday

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The only thing we didn t like was having to leave  From the moment we arrived to the moment we left we were amazed by the exceptional quality and the friendliness of the staff Definitely a once in a life time experience that we have been lucky enough to have fulfilled

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Not a caring organization I was not given a late check out of 4 hours after staying in a suite for four nights I had to wait in the front desk while checking out as the concerned staff had to leave the place to escort a checking in guest   The interior decor of the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: A British hotel not having provision for making tea in the room Also it was inconvenient not to have walk in shower   Breakfast was great so was the service The Concierge was superb

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: No business center breakfast is expensive and daily the same no corner for fat free and gluten free which should available in this stander hotel  Staff cleanliness St nder hotel of 5 stars

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Staff The housekeeping staff were perhaps shy they would almost never greet us if we walk past them It should also be a practice that they knock first before opening a room Once I was by the door checking my outfit in the wardrobe mirror when a male staff just literally unlocked the door and barged into the room we were both really shocked good thing I was not naked He was very apologetic and speechless and ended up asking me if there was a maid in the room turns out he was supposed to go into the room next door oops Service We availed to have the daily telegraph delivered to the room each morning however we only received it on one occasion This is not really a big deal for me but I would expect greater attention to detail from such a hotel   We stayed for 3 nights and loved everything about this hotel the history atmosphere rooms furnishing everything made us feel like we were years away from the present time The room The room was very spacious especially considering how central the hotel is it is definitely a luxury to stay in a room that big in central London The bathroom was nice and marbled they even put a lovely fresh stem of flower by the sink for you They also had a heated rack for the towels so it was really nice and warm after a long nice shower I loved the pressure of the shower as well it was quite strong considering the vintage style Hot water water temperature was consistent throughout the shower and the shampoo and conditioner they provide was really great I thought it made my hair look and feel better The location I cannot think of a better location than where the Ritz was It was very close to the main shopping street so you can be shopping till you dropped on Regent street but far enough so that the flow of people around the hotel wasn t all too overwhelming There are several restaurants near the hotel and the lovely Green Park is literally beside it talk about convenience and easy access to the underground they even have The Ritz marked on the underground exit Staff The staff were friendly and very professional reception was very efficient checked in without problems and check out was even smoother The doormen were all lovely the attire smiles hat and that special charm when they greet you oh they were most consistent in greeting us and we always felt like being transported to another time Service They were very helpful and responsive when inquiries are made We have requested to leave our luggage for a week with the hotel upon checkout since we were headed to Scotland and they gladly assisted us We were really impressed and appreciated their service considering we left quite a few things

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: No tea coffee facilities in the room dissappointing We booked a Superior King room I would be surprised if it were a superior room Certainly didn t seem it we had an interconnecting door to the next suite Stayed at the Shard last year and prefer it there   The building is amazing service fantastic excellent food too

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: After checkout we needed to change clothes and had to use disabled toilet as no other room available   The best bed I have ever slept on and I am very fussy about comfort They kept our luggage all day even allowing us to access it to get a change of clothes after afternoon tea Cheerful and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London

Full_Review: The ritz exceeded our expectations it was a truly amazing experience the hotel room was amazing and we were given complimentary chocolates and cake for a friends birthday All the staff are amazing and make your stay We can t wait to go again

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Kept waiting for a very long time to receive breakfast Were compensated with a glass of champagne Did think other tables were served before us as they have been considered more important Found the hard sell a bit wearing at times No tea making facilities in the room   Sheer opulence Beautiful rooms and furniture Felt like a princess

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Prices are crazy 7 00 for water Breakfast on average 100 per couple and dinner over priced and not that great have eaten better for less money  Amazing down to earth staff nothing was too much trouble the Best service ever

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: It would have been nice to have tea and coffee making facilities in the room   The hotel is amazing all that I expected and more but it was the staff who made it perfect Without exception every single member of staff was friendly helpful courteous polite and professional thank you everyone for making this a truly memorable stay

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: This is one of those places where you would pay more to feel cheap Being so proud of keeping the traditions this hotel s management forgot the importance of customer service Although I needed to have food in order to take my medication before leaving for a meeting the hotel REFUSED to provide any food for me other than the 29 breakfast I almost begged them for something quick like a croissant They asked me to order from the room although I told them that I am in hurry for a meeting before my flight and there is no time for a full breakfast They also told me that there are so many great places outside the hotel which I can get some food in although it was raining heavily I came back 10 50am and asked whether breakfast is still available Instead of answering me with yes or no the feedback was we do not allow jeans After that they would tell me no food is available now I find this too rude Keeping the high society manners is not only about the looks but also about how you treat other people Paying for an expensive hotel room within a hotel which identifies itself as prestigious should only mean that I will check out feeling great Dress code was listed on the website briefly and the meaning of smart casual was not explained Why would I need to have food outside the hotel Just because you would not want to be generous enough to offer other quick options An annoying capitalistic approach which is very rude and not so kind Next time IF I decided to enjoy the interior design of the Ritz again I will make sure to pack my fur coat and diamond earrings to get a better service The Ritz ruined my happy London trip   I love the interior design Actually it is the only thing that might let me go back to this hotel again Room slippers were comfy In room dining was good Some of the staff were very nice but some were not

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: We were not able to obtain a room with a view  Quality of staff and their attention to detail We have enjoyed the hospitality of many International Hotels across the globe however not one exceeds the combination of style excellence and management of the Ritz

Full_Review: Overpriced and overrated with laughable priced drinks Bathroom needed updating grouting shabby stain around base of toilet bowl This hotel lives on it s tradition reputation and it s name I think it could do with stepping up the mark in terms of refreshing each room s d cor Overall it was OK but there are other 5 hotels with better facilities and more realistic prices It s a shame as was expecting so much more It was a nice experience though   really comfy bed Fantastic bar area with really great atmosphere Be warned you need to book a table in the bar even if you are a guest Professional and courteous manager who responded well to our comments and sorted things out rapidly and with respect

Full_Review: Believe it or not we could not find tea making facilities in the room However the whole experience was so fantastic that it really didn t matter   The levels of customer service were exemplary in showing other supposed premium brands how things should be done Attentive and personalised but not intrusive or smothering The receptionist went out of her way to make a special occasion visit even more memorable with some brilliant personal touches Room was spacious and comfortable whilst being opulent and luxurious Nice relaxing atmosphere not at all stuffy created by a measured pace of service nothing felt rushed at all Truly excellent all round
