Full_Review: Having to leave   Bed comfy linens fresh bright and changed twice a day Room large and high ceilings elaborate decor gilt and painted furnishings Service exceptional smart staff polite and efficient

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: If i had one negative it was the view from window but that was only because it was where it was situated   The service was excellent Bed was comfy Breakfast in bed was wonderful

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Everything was perfect right down to the selection of bath towels beautiful large pillows The hotel was magnificent would love to return asap

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: NOTHING   Everything The hotel in our eyes is faultless in every way I ve never stayed anywhere like it It was a surprise for my wife s 30th birthday and they couldn t have done anymore If you can go to this hotel is a must and the afternoon tea is 10 10

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Can t think of anything negative Missed having tea making facilities in the room but packets of sugar coffee and tea bags etc would spoil the whole Ritz effect and coffee by room service is such a lovely treat   The whole Ritz experience from start to finish is wonderful you are made to feel valued and special Every member of staff is a credit to their uniform genuine happy smiling faces courteous they are all very special people The rooms are beautiful the Rivoli Bar is extra special A night at the Ritz should be on everyone s bucket list Can t wait to go again

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: We arrived 2 hours before our check in I had told the hotel this Polite staff BUT I think it would have been really nice if we had been offered a drink whilst we waited for our room on the house This is the case in top US hotels   Excellent service comfortable room lovely breakfast nothing too much trouble

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I stay at The Ritz quite often when I come down to London Having stayed in many luxury hotels during my career over the world I think that the Ritz maintains elegance and old fashioned manners and attention to detail which are rare to find these days They manage quiet courtesy and manners and I always feel welcomed back on return visits

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Seating during the breakfast offered was not the most convenient despite of the fact that a number of more suitable tables available We stayed three nights Happened on all three occasions   Location atmosphere There was a problem with the room Complained Expediently offered a better alternative

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Everything was wonderful there was nothing I disliked   Where do I begin The building is beautiful the hotel is prestigious the bedrooms well decorated and comfortable and the service impeccable The full English breakfast was probably the best breakfast I ve ever had the bacon was very tasty the cheese and mushroom omelet had a good amount of cheese in and the fresh orange juice was wonderful It couldn t have been better

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: absolutely nothing for us it was a perfect weekend  the whole experience was wonderful we were made to feel really special from the 1st minute to the last We have never enjoyed a stay as good as this

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Fancied a cup of tea but no tea or coffee   We got up graded which was really nice we had to wait our room was not ready Not a nice view really of the air con No tea coffee But beautiful room We had fabulous lunch in the restaurant beef Wellington for 2 the best ever Good service and well looked after Thankyou we had a lovely stay

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Can t think of anything   Everything was just perfect I had an angus burger from room service and it probably was the best hamburger I ever had We enjoyed the breakfast and the legendary Tea at The Ritz ceremony Simply WOW

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like   Staff were excellent nothing was too much trouble Room very spacious and clean with great attention to detail Breakfast a triumph

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Attentive staff but not in your face happy atmosphere old fashioned courtesy nothing too much trouble little extras given for our anniversary thoughtful staff and gestures beautiful food felt relaxed and comfortable in setting

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: there was initial problem with the booking and room given however the problem was sorted once made known  staff all associated with the hotel impeccable expected nothing less though have stayed there previously and they never falter they put on the ritz and they truly are the ritz

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: i would of liked to be able to make a cup of tea in my room in the morning before breakfast i feel some entertainment would be nice within the bar as we wanted to just have a cocktail and sit i feel a singer nothing heavy just something to enjoy as we stayed in the week you possibly do this at weekends though   room was lovely very comfortable the afternoon tea was a lovely experience enjoyed dressing well and the staff are 10 out of 10 as for the bedrooms beautiful and the bed was the most comfortable bed we have ever slept in

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Exceptional service that felt genuine sincere and extremely heartfelt We were made to feel very special Every front of house staff went out of their way to make our stay extremely memorable The Doormen Reception and Concierge staff are world class

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There is absolutely nothing to dislike   With all the hustle bustle outside in Piccadilly when you walk into The Ritz it s as if you have been transported into another time You feel at ease as soon as you walk in the comfort of the accommodation is completely relaxing Our meal in the Ritz Restaurant was an amazing dining experience the food was out of this world The overall service ambience of the hotel is first class We were there to celebrate my wife s 50th birthday it gave us some phenomenal memories to keep The breakfast starts your day off well again the food service is outstanding During the day or after a trip to the theatre drinks in the Rivoli Bar are something to behold if your tipple is Champagne there are lots of choices also wines cocktails to choose from too All in all this is somewhere to stay that makes you feel really special gives you fabulous service is excellent value for money We shall definitely be returning to once again be part of The Ritz Experience

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Staff at the entrance can be a little bit rude if you re not dressed the part and they don t recognise you  Very elegant and luxurious building restaurant is very good spa is also very good

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: would love tea and coffee making facilities in the room australians love that  was impressed by all staff and facilities The car picked us up from the airport and the driver was very informative on the history and locations of points of interest

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I thought the ladies powder room in the entrance was looking a little worn But they have a lot of visitors so I can understand this   Beautiful hotel set apart from the rest by excellent service and amazing staff We had continental breakfast everyday at the hotel and it was delicious When my husband came in from a run he was handed a bottle of water these extra touches were really appreciated The location is also absolutely fantastic

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Tiny shower unable to adjust water pressure not any tea making facilities in room so had to use room service very expensive cup of tea poor communication between staff as they entered room whilst we were asleep after long flight from Australia still had welcome letter etc for previous traveller in room for 2 days   Breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: No tea or coffee making facilities in the room I like tea as soon as I wake up not waiting for someone to deliver it 20mins to half an hour later If there is a mini bar why not tea sumptuous but tealess  Everything was 1st class

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Nothing to dislike  The decor particularly the restaurant is beautiful The staff are friendly and professional Attention to detail with service loved every minute

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The news papers rarely gets delivered But rest is just great   The friendliness of the staff especially a receptionist by the name Jenny She was amazingly professional and made me feel as if I was at home

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Bathroom door paint flaking and peeling toilet too close to the wall Bathroom needs refurbishment   Superlative service superbly comfortable bed lovely quick filling bath Bose radio cd player but should have been a bluetooth model

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The food choices were limited but nothing to complain in specific  The customer friendly attitude the staff really knows how to make the guests feel at home and treat them like a royalty Absolutely the best customer service in London

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Shower leaked and flooded the bathroom 1 600 per night and they had a motel 6 wall hair dryer   The beds the staff s friendly helpful attitude

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Bathroom was a bit tired needed a little bit of paint but that s me being picky  Everybody was so friendly and welcoming treated you like royalty Simply amazing

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Everything about The Ritz screams sophistication and elegance It s a beautiful hotel the staff are so friendly attentive efficient welcoming and knowledgable We loved our stay and couldn t recommend it more highly

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Room a little noisy from the evening festivities in the dining room at the weekend  However the overall experience was very pleasurable and we look forward to staying at the Ritz many times more again

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Nothing I will be returning  The best hotel England has to offer The gentry the elegance the history it just speaks to you the moment you walk in If you can afford it there is no better

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There is NOTHING NOT TO LIKE ABOUT THE RITZ HOTEL   An amazing classy hotel From the moment we pulled up outside in the taxi to the moment we left we felt like royalty Every member of staff are trained to the highest standard food was incredible surroundings luxurious bedrooms are palatial can t wait to return It s an institution and was so happy to have our incredible memories with us for ever

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Beds could have been bit more comfy   Staff so helpful in every way especially Antonella They made my mums 60th birthday extra special at breakfast they gave a lovely birthday cake THANKYOU THE RITZ FOR MAKING MY MUMS BIRTHDAY MAGICAL

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The hotel enforces a strict dress code a tie a coat even for having tea and coffee Guests should know about this at booking time Also the staff communicate and enforce this in an arrogant way intimidating the guests   The facility is great and superb The location is very good

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Piccadilly traffic noise police sirens can intrude a little but that s probably true of any 5 star hotel in Central London   Superb friendly service Exemplary attention to detail Sumptuous comfort A very special experience

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing   The bed was super comfy the room was excellent with beautiful detailing and the bathroom very clean and luxurious With welcoming and friendly professional staff made our stay very enjoyable

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Service was excellent staff without exception courteous and polite room perfect management had left us a birthday cake on arrival If you want to make a loved one feel valued and special take them to the Ritz

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: That our stay was too short   Went to celebrate my 50th birthday with my 13 year old daughter Felt nervous arriving but the young lady on reception made us feel so welcome Was upgraded to an executive suite which was beautiful Thete was a birthday cake along with goodies for my daughter chocolates drink biscuits and a teddy bear They also put books and dvds for my daughter to use Very thoughtful with all the nice touches Breakfast was delicious served in an amazing room Staff were very attentive Thank you

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: This was a special birthday present for my girlfriend and the staff at The Ritz were incredible They gave us a warm welcome presented the bedroom with a birthday cake and a card The room was impeccable quality We also had afternoon tea where the staff brought out another birthday cake and the pianist played happy birthday A wonderful experience we shall never forget can t wait to come back soon

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Sky did not work in our room even after maintenance had visited Poor service at breakfast Having chosen fruit yogurt to start just sat down to eat and hot breakfast was delivered when I had just started Not impressed Bad end to a perfect stay   Impressive d cor and a relaxing place to stay

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Friendly but perfectly correct staff fantastic food and a bed I never wanted to leave Located a short walk away from all that Mayfair has to offer Couldn t fault it

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Most comfortable bed i ve ever slept on I m a londoner living abroad so it takes a lot for me to book a hotel here rather than staying at my own place or with family friends however could not fault the Ritz for outstanding service and location

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Stunning hotel and fabulous staff Our room was gorgeous overlooking the park We had booked on a whim as we were having afternoon tea given to my husband as a present and it is now a firm favourite and as long as the deal is good it will be our first choice for our regular trips to London

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: When you pay so much for a meal you expect absolute perfection The only criticism is the food perhaps fell short of the very top bar   Staff are very friendly Customer service is excellent It was my wife s birthday and they delivered her a small cake Very nice touch For a special occasion it s very enjoyable

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I travelled with my wife and daughter we had an appointment in Great Ormond Street Hospital we had to listen to the loud noises that other couples were making in other rooms I was so embarrassed in front of my daughter that I asked at reception to be moved but I was discussed at the way the person on reception had a smirk on their face and I wasn t moved to another room The same happened the following night and my wife complained she got a different reaction the reception was then going to move us but what was the point when we were checking out in the morning Regards Derek Campbell

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: It took a while to have the water hot for the morning shower   Staying at The Ritz it s always amazing Simply everything is the way it should be Many times when you lodge in a five stars hotel you don t get what you pay for That does not happen at The Ritz Keep it up

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: This hotel and the service you get is outstanding All the staff are so helpful The room we had was amazing Worth every penny if you want a nice treat

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Nothing   Free upgrade to a suite Flowers and birthday cake already in room on arrival All complimenary Little touches such as this make the stat so much more

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: We had to request evening turn down and cleaning of an earlier room service Not expected of such a resudence  Traditional hotel with a lot of interesting history Lovely decorated for Xmas

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Great location for parks shopping and galleries Excellent room a good size and very quiet Breakfast was wonderful The choice was just right It was not an overwhelming buffet but just enough and the quality of the food was very good while the dining room is just a joy to sit in The bar was pleasant and the staff attentive and polite We even got to taste two or three wines before making our choice A highlight of our visit was the bag of frozen peas which we needed in order to cook a pea velout for a Christmas lunch This was greeted with a Well I ve never had a request like that before but a sous chef arrived within two minutes and handed over a bag of peas with a smile We are eternally grateful The pea velout was Ritz standard And the Christmas decorations were so fantastic that we just had to take some photos

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Too many people from outside hotel so facilities weren t available to guests eg afternoon tea or Christmas dinners booked by external visitors months in advance A number of places should be held for residents Staff knocked too often offering service Meant well but became a nuisance   Lovely staff Beautiful Christmas decorations Quiet rooms

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Having asked for some toast with my breakfast disappointed that the cooked meal was eaten and the toast still hadn t arrived  The staff were excellent very helpful friendly and professional

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The breakfast bufet menu offer was not so extensive three days are more than enough to eat it Very noisy corridor next to our room doors are definitely not soundproof   Very friendly staff Room service twice a day unfortunately not in the hours we agreed Very good location near Buckingham palace and Piccadilly Circus

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Friendly welcoming staff wonderful spacious room and a stones throw from Bond Street Fantastic bar with great array of cocktails if you want luxury no one does it better

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The first night room did not match the photo of the one on line It was on the 7th floor and it felt like we were in the attic But they did move us without fuss when I pointed it out Unnecessary mistake on their part Why   The ambience was wonderful and the staff were very friendly breakfast could be slicker they brought my porridge at the same time as my bacon but dinner was wonderful

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Leaving  Staying at the ritz was absolutely amazing loved every minute of it Staff was so helpful and couldn t do enough for you We got upgraded to a suite which was amazing and they did a lovely turn down service while we was out in the evening Breakfast was great too Lovely time of the year to go with the Christmas decorations up they look stunning x

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Poor service tired decor dirty carpets and mediocre food This is not a Ritz Carlton Hotel If you are accustomed to Ritz Carlton standards you will be disappointed

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Service was nowhere near what we expected Simple paper request in the morning didn t arrive confusion over suitability of attire to go into the hotel bar too under reassure at the front desk to collect luggage slow food service at breakfast 3 separate requests at breakfast for a spoon each which eventually say one delivered   Room was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There wasn t anything   All of the staff were extremely friendly and pleasant When we went down for breakfast on our second day all of the Christmas decorations had been put up which were amazing

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: There was nothing we didn t like about our stay  We were celebrating our birthday and they came to our room with two birthday cakes which were amazing

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: our 50th wedding anniversary they gave us a free upgrade to a junior suite chocolates a cake and two champagne cocktails and a book on the history of the Ritz a fabulous experience great staff and management

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I had read other peoples reviews some great some not I have got to say although this cost me an absolute fortune it was worth every penny to see my mums face light up I had booked this as a early Xmas present for my mum me and a friend the staff where amazing I have never known such attention to detail friendly attentive and brilliant food was great and they where able to accommodate my allergies easily with plenty of choice The staff where very easy going and ready for a chat and a laugh not stuffy or miserable as lead to believe by some of the reviews the room was lovely and clean and the beds where so comfy I slept the best I had slept in ages The only downside is the drinks are very expensive but the memories we are left with are priceless I would recommend this to anyone wanting to create a lasting memory for a family member or friend Go treat yourself

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Oozes quality Comfortable bed quality room fantastic attention to detail service lunch The afternoon tea which we had in the evening was superb

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I asked for an extension of stay for one night 2 days before I had to check out The staff was very indifferent and casual Just Before chencking out I got a room

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I commented in my booking that it was my first time in London and that I wanted a room with a nice view and when we got there they told me they d upgraded my room to a junior suite The square footage was enormous their were towel warmers and they refreshed our towels and toiletries twice a day

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: From the moment we arrived everything was PERFECT The staff were all so lovely as was our room The food was wonderful and our visit was truly memorable

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: To be perfectly honest there were no disappointments all my highest expectations were either met or surpassed   During my four day visit to London The Ritz London personified what a luxury hotel should be I have been a guest of the hotel multiple times in the past and had high expectations that were met or surpassed From the helpful reception and concierge staff the housekeeping staff and room service personnel each was attentive and efficient All of the decor the silver service and china used in room service are just superb I anxiously await my next visit

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: I arrived to the hotel at 9 30 and received my room at 14 00 4 5 hours waiting time at lobby I asked them for early check in before and more funny the wifi just was available in front door not in my room and not in lobby area at least for my cellphone staffs trayed to solve the problem but were not successful finally they sent a laptop for room   Room size Room facilities Decoration

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Arrived at 4pm after a long train journey from Scotland to be advised our room was not quite ready We were ushered through to the Rivoli Bar where they served us a complimentary pot of tea The issue was we had an appointment at 5pm and this delay seriously impacted on our promptness for this meeting Told our room had a good view of Green Park when in fact it had a partial view of the park and good view of noisy Piccadilly   Staff were attentive room was clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: Are expectations of the Ritz Hotel in London were exceeded on all levels and John on concierge was marvellous an absolute gentleman full of personality and a fantastic head of house Al the staff made our stay very special

Full_Review: was unhappy with the commutation before my stay spoke to one member of staff that told me 1 thing then when I rang back was told not true they would ring me back heard nothing then I rang asked to speak to manager was told not available would ring me back still had no phone call back that was disappointing  once we were it was very good very happy with the staff

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: The character of the building and especially the dining room was excellent The customer service was also excellent particularly when I needed a dinner suit pressed within the hour Dinner service on the evening was excellent the staff ensured that all of our party were very comfortable during the whole evening The food was good however I had higher expectations from this establishment

Hotel_Name: The Ritz London
Full_Review: None of the instructions I requested were followed but was taken care of after arrival I had booked 4 rooms and was told 3 rooms werent ready for check in Rooms became available at around 4 00 pm but 1 of the rooms was not up to specs and I had to get it changed yet again Hot water stopped at 10am the following morning but engineers fixed it promptly and they gave us an extra hour to check out The bathroom light was constantly flickering The staff it seems dont pay much attention to wear and tear as also evidenced by the huge crack in the wall as soon as you enter the hotel on the right side Booking com said free parking but they charged 120 pounds for parking 2 cars overnight I had guests from the usa who were not very impressed with the Ritz at all and suggested that for the money I paid we could have gotten a much better experience elsewhere There is no swimming pool Excellent Afternoon tea but I would not stay at the Ritz London again The 4 seasons hotel is definitely a better experience   Location and staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Odd one but the overwhelming smell of air freshener both in the main hotel and the room I get it you have a spa and use Elemis products but it was just too overpowering I m tech savvy but the TV is over complicated make it simpler   Friendly and welcoming staff nicely appointed rooms love the Nespresso machine comfortable bed and very clean and tidy overall a great find

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: A very modern and comfortable hotel next to the Old Street metro station It is a big hotel but not anonymous The staff gives personal attention and is very friendly and helpful The room is spacious with a very comfortable bed Lights curtains and tv can all be controlled with a touch screen very futuristic We had a room with a beautiful view over the city Overall excellent value for money

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The location was great 2 mins walk from Old Street Station also great facilities helpful staff and in vibrant area clean and modern bathroom and high tech controls

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I don t think I have anything bad to say about this hotel despite the little technical problem i had with my TV everything was excellent as the staff were very good at make sure everything in my room was how it should be   I loved everything about this hotel the staff the food the room and everything it had to offer The staff were so lovely and very welcoming

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: poor shower telly on low volume can not turn up as preset treated like a child wife has a massage massage good no candles or ambience to room at all spa pool cold also came here for roof top bar bar not there no more which is a shame restaurant food ok but whole area god do with a rethink very bland  comfy bed location good hi tech room shower no power to it just fell out of shower head clean room

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: For 180 a night I would have hoped that a full English breakfast be included we got a continental breakfast but it was very limited   The room was perfect Everything we needed Great views Clean Tidy

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing to quibble really but maybe a booklet with brief notes about hotel and times of breakfast spa opening would have been handy   Not sure what genius perks are Bed very comfy Good facilities with nespresso machine etc Didn t use mini bar Room very clean and stylish Loved bathroom and fantastic shower Loved spa facililities Wished had had time for some wellness treatments maybe next time Breakfast tasty liked that staff filled up coffee cup without asking Staff very professional and friendly

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Couldn t complain about a thing   Stunning hotel had everything I could have asked for staff where great and would have loved to have stayed longer to enjoy all their facilities spa etc

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff speak with very strong French accent English which I have a little problem to listen to 3 people stayed in the room but only provided 2 people s robes and toothbrushes and slippers A 5 star hotel should have prepared for us However the service is incredible so I don t find this too disappointing  The bed is extremely comfy The natural lighting is perfect The room design is very elegant and modern The staff is very friendly The room has all the equipment i needed

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Loved everything   Amazing modern rooms and very friendly staff Great breakfast with lots of choice Hotel was really close to the tube station so very easy to get around London Having a coffee machine in the room was really nice and the dressing gowns are so fluffy We were also given a 20 voucher to spend in the bar which was a really nice touch and I would defiantly stay again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Very loud neighbours Sound proofing of rooms isn t great Woken at 3 30 in morning to voices and giggling Huge TV with terrible sound Not a great service when we left We weren t asked how our stay was or thanked   Excellent bar staff Very clean Friendly service

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I booked a cot for my one year old When I arrived at the room at 7 30 They had made the sofa into a bed I complained and it took an hour to resolve By which time my daughter as very tired and upset I had to make three phone calls to resolve First to housekeeping then to reception and another to housekeeping I booked into the hotel on return from Paris so that my daughter wouldn t be late to bed Which clearly was not the outcome Ps small pot of M Ms 6  The level of room technology Comfort of bed

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Staff were very polite and friendly Room was comfortable had a really good nights sleep Shower was powerful Coffee tea facilities better than most

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The bed seemed to be two singles pushed together so it had a weird dip after some time of rolling about in it The TV peaks volume level 25 which can be annoying if someone is showering while you are watching tv Food at the hotel is craaaazy high we ordered food in the area there are so many places to eat in shoreditch  We stayed at the weekend and there is totally free parking on the side road all of Saturday and Sunday It s also not in congestion zone so we left by 8 30 with no parking charges The room was super high tech and totally entertaining The spa is basic but clean and fun with lovely fresh infused water available

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Check in could have been faster   Stayed here previously as the location is close to where my son lives and therefore very convenient Hotel is very modern and staff very friendly Check in seemed to be a little slow but we were offered a glass of Prosecco as we waited We booked a Club double and the room was spacious clean with the usual mod cons Wouldn t hesitate to stay again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The only downside was the spa being half closed on the Monday morning without any notice And not that it was a massive problem but the tablets that control all the lights and Aircon in the room all crashed once during the stay but I managed to sort that   The room was stunning the service was excellent and I loved that the room came with a complimentary smart phone to use throughout the stay And as if all of that wasn t good enough the spa was amazing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Room took a while to cool down warm up  Beds and pillows were heavenly Fixtures and fitting very high end Staff extremely welcoming and friendly Great pool and gym

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Totally disappointed had been recommended this hotel booked the restaurant for the evening meal daughters 21st birthday actually only to be told on arrival it was closed an noone could locate our booking had to find a taxi and go elsewhere not towels available in the swimming area and upon our arrival of a pre booked booking reception insisted they need to see out card we booked with which was at home had to ask our son to send a picture of it do fail to see the relevance of this

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast did not impress Three types of cereal milk and toast from Tesco for 16 GBP I would expect a nice continental buffet from a place at this level  Excellent room comfy bed friendly staff

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Technology in the room was not particularly useful or helpful and didn t always function properly   The hotel stay was enjoyable the location is great and the staff were helpful and always polite Fitness facilities excellent the bar area was pleasant and busy morning and evening

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing   Good location Close to Old street subway only 3 mins walk Easy to get to King s Cross Neighborhood is good with a lot of eateries Upscale neighborhood

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast was rather pricey so we ate elsewhere   We liked just about everything at this fantastic modern hotel Our room was generously sized and very clean with lovely comfy beds tasteful decor and all mod cons Bathroom was also much more generously proportioned than most other London hotels I have stayed at Staff were very helpful and friendly We took a dip in the swimming pool which was small but very nice and clean Shoreditch isn t tbe most scenic location but I would definitely stay at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: It was a triple room but there were only 2 proper mugs and insufficient milk cartons   A high tech room with touchpad lighting and temperature controls and a huge tv The beds were extremely comfortable A great shower and a proper coffee machine too

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff had no idea what they were doing the ipads in the rooms did not turn off so I had to put something on them to get a dark room at night and the breakfast that is included is a sad excuse for a breakfast   Nice new hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Not quiet Noise from street felt like you were on the road and I was on the 5th floor Air conditioning is either hot or freezing Not comfortable Spa is anything but a spa   Comfortable Beds

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I can t find anything to complain about   I liked everything about my stay from the check in to the check out everything went perfectly We can feel the house is very well kept everyone was warm and professional it was extremely clean design and for the price especially in London it s an extremely good deal The SPA and swimming pool are a big plus

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I felt slightly worried about using the lockers in case by bits got stuck in there as the combination system had no instructions and you only put the code in once Changing rooms were on the small side The hotel bar closed reasonably early by 11pm The night time room service food menu was rather small and limited with no nibbles   We have been to many luxury premium style hotels in and around London and often avoid larger ones and instead opting for smaller boutique style hotels however this hotel way surpassed all of my expectations by putting in all the little luxury touches that you could expect from a boutique hotel Positives Our first contact was with front desk where the member of staff was polite helpful welcoming and informative He couldn t be any more helpful and was a great first impression The reception area is clean modern and comfortable Fruit seating lighting furniture and air fresheners all ensured that the hotel had a luxurious feel The hallway looked glamourous and modern clean and air conditioned Our room had lovely modern furniture and decor Towels and bedding were great quality and the bed and pillows offered superior comfort and a great nights sleep There were Elemis consumeable products in the bathroom as well as an excellent hairdryer and even an umbrella There were also dressing gowns slippers and a mobile gadget that you can use as a tour guide if needed Free in room safe iron and ironing board too Complimentary and premium quality teas coffees as well as a well stocked mini barvwitb transparent pricing There were room and bedside options for the excellent air con system as well as dimmable room and bedside lighting under floor heating mood lighting night lighting curtain operation and TV including Sky Sports The mirror in the room and bathroom were thoughtful touches often missing from other hotels and a great size desk and lounge chair with footstool The spa was equally lovely with complimentary towel dressing gown and pool side flip flops to use during your visit and refrigerated water by the pool The shower also had complimentary Elemis products for use Pool sauna and steam room of a fair size and small Jacuzzi too Breakfast was delicious with very attentive staff and great view onto the street below

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The pads used to control the lighting keeped slipping out of the WiFi so we had get to get help from reception to turn them of to sleep but the staff was extremely helpful and quick to get it sorted   The you went to check in I got given a glass of presseco which after a long day traveling went down a treat The room was beautiful spacious and clean I could not fault it the bed was comfortable and so big had very good night s sleep there was no noise from outside either As guests we got to use the spa and pool after a long day was so relaxing and just what u needed the staff are helpful and show you where to go and provide u with towels robes and slippers to wear We even got a free complimentary breakfast I would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like I d reccomend this hotel any time to anyone   Staff has upgraded our room as it was a first visit gave us all the instructions and directions to navigate around the building The stay was absolutely amazing And the fact that tube station is literally 2 mins walk and about 10mins walk there s a number of really nice places to grab something to eat that makes it even better Looks exactly like on the pictures Beautiful hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Televison kept buffering and the the picture pixelated The twin beds were too close they need more disatance between them  Beds were good lighting was great as some hotels are too dark the lights were ajustable from an ipad which meant you could adjust to how you wanted them important when doing makeup

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff at this hotel are very welcoming and friendly nothing is to much trouble The hotel is immaculately clean and the rooms are lovely Travelled for my dad s birthday there were cakes and a balloon for him in the room A very pleasant enjoyable stay We will be back Thank you

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Customer service nobody answered the phone when ringing the front desk The air conditioning kept on resetting to heat to 24 degrees   Nice Pool and sauna Modern

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Didn t find anything I didn t like   Processco on arrival birthday cake and balloon delivered to the room excellent staff techie room for the husband

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I had a late check out at 2pm but still had two different house keepers knock my door at different times after 12pm they should of been informed that I had a late check out as this was disturbing to me and my partner trying to relax   Greeted with champagne on arrival bed was super comfortable

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: 20 minute check in process which was ridiculously over complicated especially as we had already paid The room was all digitally controlled and annoyingly randomly switch all the nights and tech on at 5am and again at 6 The receptionist didn t seem to care   Bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: One of the iPads was hit and miss Didn t work properly for our stay and the Maintenance team visited a couple of times to establish issue never really solved it during our stay They were polite and also the hotel offered some wine to make up for inconvenience But we will go back to stay here think we were just unlucky with our particular tech in our room   Friendly concierge Charmaine guest experience Arrange a little chocolate treat balloons and dresses room with petal fit husbands birthday All complimentary South a nice touch

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: It was excellent to have a gym there but for a modern hotel the gym could have been better equipped for example it was very small and not many weight machines although the cardio equipment was fine The fact that breakfast wasn t included in the room rate was a real downside for us As we are vegetarians vegans we never make full use of everything in a buffet style breakfast anyway so we were not willing to pay extra for it  Really liked the comfortable bed one of the most comfortable i have ever had in a hotel also liked the modern technology and feel the big shower head in the bathroom friendly staff and the location

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Didn t have breakfast this time as it was more expensive than other hotels  Huge bed so comfy and the pillows were the best ever Staff brilliant Complimentary glass of Prosecco whilst checking in Don t usually like modern but the room was fabulous Fantastic shower rain shower or off the wall option also powerful Would stay there again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff went above and beyond to make our trip a lovely experience As I was celebrating my birthday a balloon cakes fruit and a card were brought up to our room It was a fantastic surprise and so well thought out

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: From check in to end it was an amazing stay The staff made everything perfect for my cousins birthday The spa and facilities are 1st class and clean Breakfast was lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: See above expensive breakfast  Very nice hotel and a great experience however the breakfast at 25 pp was extortianate so didn t bother which is a shame if it was around the 10 mark we would have gone for it

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Personally I feel this hotel is over priced I booked this hotel because of a special offer on booking com the price for a deluxe double was reduced from 300 to 167 The price I paid I think was fair for the room but if I d paid 300 I wouldn t have been very impressed It s a nice room but I wouldn t say it was superior to hotels which charge 150 200 a night Especially as that price doesn t even include breakfast Given that it is a tech hotel we would have expected the TV to be better quality The picture was blurry the sound was distorted and buzzy and it was difficult to operate the remote buttons weren t very responsive   The staff here are very helpful and polite Check in was easy and we were offered a complimentary glass of prosecco a nice touch Our room was on the 6th floor a good size with a nice bathroom We liked the tech touches which consisted of 2 tablets by the bed to control curtains and lighting night light desk light bedside light mood lighting etc a tablet by the bathroom to control lights air conditioning underfloor heating bathroom only They also offer a complimentary smartphone with unlimited 4G which you can take out of the hotel and with you for the duration of your trip There was also a Nespresso machine kettle selection of teas and coffee and a minibar although a little empty The bed was super comfy and warm one of the best nights sleep ever We also liked the complimentary bath robes which were soft and cosy and complimentary slippers We walked to the hotel from South Bank to sight see and it took us around 45 minutes at a comfortable pace The location is fairly central you re minutes from Old Street Station

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: No bath in room  Comfy bed complimentary prosecco on arrival coffee machine an added bonus lots of really nice touches in room and everything is controlled by touch screen

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The room lights A C TV door etc control software had numerous bugs The room had to be rebooted by the staff at one point   It was the most high tech room I ve ever stayed in

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: No big issues to complain about but for the price 282GBP night 2 persons me and my 14y o son the included breakfast was kind of a little too simple there was an option to pay 29EUR person day for some more breakfast but I did not choose that There was no light in the room wardrobe area One of the all controlling tablets was not working   Really nice and responsive staff ready to help with each issue Special thanks to Victoria at the front desk Hotel is modern and cozy Great location nice surroundings I wish I had more time to enjoy the hotels SPA pool and gym There was a coffee machine in the room with complementary coffee capsules as well as tee and some biscuits Great to have slippers and dressing gown provided

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The hotel was so beautiful service was spectacular and they always went the extra mile Gave complimentary prosecco and breakfast as it was my partners birthday The bed was to die for Will definetly be back

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Most amazing hotel I ve ever stayed in I felt like it was so clean and modern that we were the first to stay in the room when we obviously weren t 100 recommend Staff were always lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Outstanding level of customer service Special requests I had made were completed to a very high standard and they made every effort to make the trip memorable

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Very expensive for breakfast but there are plenty of nearby places to eat   Excellent location very clean and modern hotel with very friendly and efficient staff Great spa facilities which were great to use after a long day s sightseeing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The room was super modern and automated The bathroom had underfloor heating which was awesome I really enjoyed the pool and jacuzzi area amazing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Bedside table slightly dusty but it was a room swap so maybe it had been vacant for a while   Originally given a disabled room and found the sink too low but this was quickly rectified by obliging and helpful staff Wonderfully comfortable bed and first class facilities Extremely quiet and full blackout curtains Given a glass of fizz on arrival which was a nice touch Definitely go back

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing   Modern and comfortable hotel friendly staff close to the center of the city City Covent Garden Public transport very close Good value for money

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Having to wait 35 minutes for someone to bring extra quilts pillows to our room for the sofa bed and when we rang down to reception the man tut d also things missing from mini bar  Extra comfy bed quiet

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing  Amazing service and high tech facilities I needed to call reception to request a few items for the room and they were extremely accommodating and helpful One of the nicest hotels I have ever stayed in

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: This modern hotel is centrally located very clean and The staff couldn t have been more accommodating There were several bars all lively with great drinks and service

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Far too much tech which does not run on high speed broadband Very poor speed everything runs of it TV etc We had to call a technician twice as it didn t work so we gave up   Love the bar and the staff there they knew how to make cocktails plus it 241 It s was Als birthday and the hotel left a lovely surprise in our room The staff in general were really lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Would be nice if the complimentary mineral water would be replenished every day instead of every once in a while Had breakfast once found it a bit simple for the cost   Nice room central location Coffee and tea maker plus complimentary mineral water Swimming pool and sauna are nice extras It s close to the Old Street metro

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: one day the cleaning never came to our room and we had to call the hotel reception to arrange that for us the room was extremely hot at night we almost couldnt sleep without wokingup in the middle of the night sweating we didn t try the breakfast and also we didn t dine in any day or night so I really don t know about the food   the hotel is located extremely close the Old Street station tube in the Northern line of the London underground its location is amazing if you want to live and breath the East London vibe since it is at the heart of Shoreditch with restaurants food and coffee chains and local pubs and cafes all within a very very close distance the hotel offers an indoor pool although not so big sized and a jacuzzi and full equiped gym which is very convinient since it opperates from very early in the morning the room is all modern inside and all features from the curtain drapes to the bed table lights operates through touch screens right next to the hotel there is a pret a manger chain and a sainsbury s local which is also very convinient for a quick breakfast or some grocery shopping within a 2 minute walking distance there is a bus stop that takes you straight to Oxford street no 55 upon arrival they upgraded us to a better room as the receptionist informed us from the room we have booked and our new room is located on the 12th floor offering us an almost panoramic view of London all the way to St Paul s cathedral highly recommended

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Cleaning the floors in main reception area for a long period whilst people checking in etc   Love the devices that controlled the lighting ability to shut the curtains at the touch of a button and the room fragrance machine The bed was soooo comfortable Brilliant bars places to eat in close proximity

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I booked this as a surprise for my beloved I arrived early to check in and was delighted to receive a complimentary upgrade to a suite later we were treated to a bottle of Prosecco to celebrate our special night The iconic building is ultra modern and every detail of our stay was perfect from the incredibly comfortable massive bed which was like sleeping on clouds to the super soft bathrobes the Hermes toiletries plus the fantastic use of modern technology that allowed us to customise everything in the room including mood lighting and underfloor heating Our time spent in the indoor pool jacuzzi and steam room provided the perfect way to unwind from the stress of the cold grey London reality outside All the staff were wonderful the service was absolutely first class

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I couldn t see in anyway on how to improve sort from maybe the views from the film but that os hard due to it being in The centre of London  All staff were very polite and friendly hotel was spotless clean

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Lovely hotel room was amazing 5 min walk from the tube station Only issue was parking but luckily found a side road which is free after 1pm on Saturday s and Sunday s

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: None   High quality and spacious room Hotel staff very polite Also hotel sends staff to room checking if I need anything Contemporary design room is superb Room auto perfume dispenser makes room smell good all the time Tea and coffee in super good quality Thank you to all staff well done

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: No parking available Parked over a mile away   Fantastic new hotel great facilities perfect location Staff were very polite and professional The food was top drawer and the spa and leisure facilities were really good

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: My only minor complaint was that parking was difficult I had to park at an NCP which is approx a 10 min walk from the hotel and this cost me a whopping 78 for 2 days Not the fault of the hotel but its the only thing that dampened my experience   Amazing Fantastic Hotel By far the best hotel I have ever stayed at It is so hi tech everything about the hotel is new and fresh The entire room is controlled by touch screen The bathroom has underfloor heating the television is big and you can even change the colour of the lights in the room with the touch of a button Very very impressive The spa and pool area is designed by Versace and like the rest of the hotel just oozes class and elegance We were celebrating our wedding and my recent qualification we were given a free upgrade with a nice surprise of flowers and desserts waiting in our room

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: was quoted price of 385 but was charged 409 may have been exchange rate difference but was still great value   Great facilities comfortable room proper hairdryer wifi connection was brilliant staff friendly

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Curtains off the hooks so we corrected TV poor reception and no breakfast included When we arrived our room was allocated to someone else so had to wait until that was sorted   Bed lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Needed more milk in the room for the tea and coffee   In gadget heaven really comfy bed best shower I have ever had in a hotel Everything you needed away from home from coffee machine to sky sports

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: No instructions in room for coffee machine electronic remotes etc  Bed was really comfy Room was amazing Lots of lovely extra touches example Lovely fluffy robes not the towel ones you usually get

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing to say everything was perfect   Highly recommend We were spend just one night but absolutely happy Friendly calm receptionist room was good size even didn t look a big on pictures Restaurant very nice food excellent go to visit17th floor view There is nothing to say negative Definitely will stay again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast was ok but variety was lacking especially on fresh fruit cheeses and cold cuts   Spa was compact but nice with pool regular sauna steam room

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Parking I would suggest traveling by public transport to this hotel   The hotel has a great vibe the staff were extremely friendly The room was exactly as detailed in the pictures would definetly go back If I were to compare it to Marble Arch I would say a little trendier and the staff here provided customer service that was leaps and bounds ahead of Marble Arch Thank you for the experience and hope to see you again soon

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Great location just few minutes away from Old street station making it very easy to walk to the city Great vibe with plenty of restaurant and bars surrounding the area Hotel is very modern and beautifully designed

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The technology was confusing as didn t notice it initially my partner operated it and then in middle of the night I couldnt find a light switch TV technology wasn t working properly either My main gripe is that I made 3 separate bookings for various family members We had difficulty in getting payment made on separate cards and some bookings were billed twice prompt refund made on complaint but worst of all two couples checked in and gave in their cards but were shown to rooms occupied by other people One couple was given a new room fairly quickly but the other couple had to wait over an hour at around 11pm 12 midnight after a long tiring day before a room was found for them No compensation offered   I liked the decor design and bedding although it was a bit corporate in style The foyer and breakfast room were very attractively styled and the breakfast food was excellent The staff were very welcoming

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Location is great near the heart of Shoreditch and the Old Street Underground station to get around central London The facilities were incredibly modern and updated with a great room size

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: nice staff really helpful room had so many cool features more than i expected and overall presentation was so lovely Goood value for money would definitely go back again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: It was a fantastic place to stay really modern and high tech excellent room with a great view extra comfortable bed and the staff extra helpful and kind not to mention the excellent spa services just magical

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Price breakfast Dodgy reception on some TV channels But did appreciate the sky channels so I m just being picky really  Room beds staff facilities faultless Would recommend

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff where really accommodating Was really nice hotel Would like to stay for longer next time to use the facilities but had too much planned Thank you Zoe Harding

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I feel everything was great  The bed was super comfortable I ve stayed in other hotels in London and definitely best value for money was here The hotel has a very nice techie vibe Rooms are big for London standards Shoreditch is a hipsterish up and coming type of neighborhood Lots of good restaurants and bars It was my partner s birthday and they sent us a couple of complimentary desserts and Balloons which I thought it was a great detail

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Bed was a little soft for my liking but I think this is personal preference   The technology in the room was very good and liked the lighting which could be changed dependent on the mood We arrived early for check in and were given an upgrade if we were prepared to wait 20 minutes for the room Reception staff very friendly and air con very good too

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The touchscreen controls in the room are a nice idea but awful to use very slow and too many menus to access what you want   Staff were wonderfully friendly

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: On arrival and checking in at the hotel the staff at reception were very attentive and made us feel very welcome The staff were lovely and very friendly The gentleman who booked us in gave us an hours later check out after he asked what brought us to London and I replied my daughters 21st The hotel sent a balloon and little treats to eat for my daughters 21st birthday a lovely gesture and very much appreciated The USB port and one of the plug sockets on the side of tv unit were faulty which made them unusable The handy buddy charging dock was faulty would not charge so unusable I reported to reception so issues can be addressed for future guests Over all the room was lovely The bed and sofa bed were comfortable we slept with the mood lighting on we chose red The rainforest shower was most enjoyable as were the toiletries supplied Tea and coffee making facilities very good Good choice in mini bar but we did not use as rarely drink Over all we had a lovely experience staying at M by Montcalm and would like to thank the hotel and all staff for their hospitality   We did not have breakfast

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: We weren t told that the lights air con etc were controlled by a panel and spent a lot of time in the dark looking for the light switch   Great location super clean modern room magazines comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Speakers in room did not work Under floor heating in bathroom not working either View of cranes   Bed was very comfy Tea and coffee facilities in room were good

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I m a so impressed with the full experience of M by Montcalm that I m currently sat on a train looking to find more reasons to return to London and and stay there again keep up the good work and thank you for an unforgettable Easter weekend

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Staff are super friendly David greeted my partner and I at reception desk with a glass of prosecco I mentioned it was a birthday celebration and we were provided with added bonuses big thanks to David Such a lovely set up and really accommodates all ages Breakfast was top notch too not your avarage hotel fry up We will be going back for a third time soon

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: slow breakfast service one day Not all the staff understood English great London  The spa was lovely and the bar at the top of the hotel had excellent service

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: State of the art Hotel Room features and facilities all linked up to touch screen panels making the stay easy relaxing and convenient Handy Travel companion providing a free and unlimited mobile service including calls SMS and mobile data for navigation browsing etc This device could be taken anywhere in London saving on costs and affording you with the same luxuries of being back at home using a mobile device without being cost conscious Hotel provided complimentary vouchers to use at the bar restaurant and lounge areas Great if you re travelling on a budget or just want to enjoy a relaxing drink or coffee in the Hotel each day of stay We were provided enough vouchers enabling us to have a meal each day at the Hotel without further chargers Hotel surprised me with a pleasant Birthday desert upon arrival very courteous and generous of the staff in doing so Hotel situated in close proximity of many convenient amenities such as an underground train station less than a 10 minute walk Sainsbury Supermarket literally 3 doors down from the Hotel Pret a Manger right next door The Three Crowns Pub Restaurant less than a 30 second walk from the Hotel and a few other quaint eateries Hotel facilities decor and furniture were modern and new in appearance Hotel staff very pleasant friendly helpful and hospitable

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Super modern hotel in the heart of London s equivalent of Silicon Valley Super clean facilities were great and the entire tech theme is definitely felt throughout the experience in the hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I like complete darkness when I sleep but that was made impossible by the countless tech appliances in the room Particularly annoying the tablets fixed to the bedside lamps with screens that never really turn off same for the mood lightning which didn t help the mood at all   Location cleanliness comfort

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The location is bit far from central london but you have Shoreditch to enjoy Not really a negative but if hipster culture is not your thing then maybe central london would be a better location Other than that the place was amazing   This is a great hotel and deserves all 5 stars The staff was helpful and friendly My boyfriend had a birthday and they have decorated the room with balloons and brought the cake before I even asked The rooms are digital which is quite cool The beds are super comfy We absolutely loved it and would go back next time

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The background lighting of the tablets used to control lighting and other features could not be turned off completely during the night Mattresses could be better   Very friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The hole hotel was to hot it was like the heating was on full all the time but thats just us don t like it that hot   The location is excellent good size room and a good spa

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The bed was amazing room was a very good size could not fault the staff at all They gave me a complimentary breakfast because I was having a bad day Which was a lovely little perk room service room was erm well the Menu left a lot to be desired I understand certain staple items on menus so that all the guest have something to choose from but the menu was just so boring nothing on the menu that was beyond the norm or sparked up a appetite in any shape or form and as a lone guest I wasn t keen on dining in the restaurant by myself and I like to dine in the room but the room service menu could do with a fresher take But the gentleman that served me was lovely most of the tv channels didn t work in the room and I couldn t get a phone signal but the hotel provides a mobile you can use during the stay Which is a very unique touch from the montcalm hotel chain and amazing value for money all in all

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Drink were expensive but it was a 5star hotel   Room was spacious Loved balloons cake and fruit for my 70th Birthday Great views from windows Requested a high floor was on 15th Bus stop outside hotel tube around corner

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: They could have had more availability for spa treatments  Service in the spa was not satisfactory as i was unable to book any treatments over the two days I was there the staff seemed very rude and uptight

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff in the lobby and spa were very rude and mostly unresponsive Felt like they just saw you as a pair of legs No real people skills In the description it checks off being soundproof but our next door neighbours were very loud which resulted in multiple calls which I shouldn t have happened if it was soundproofed   Facilities were clean and well presented and the bar staff were very friendly in the evening Apart from the bad bits very good time

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Hallway could be noisy mood music played near elevator a bit loud and unnecessary quite honestly Room generally very quiet but could hear neighbour s TV one evening and morning   Location great pool and spa area were exceptional for a London hotel and one of the best indoor ones I ve been too in a hotel Great breakfast but it was free for us if had to pay would be too pricey

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Only poor the thing was the tv could loss signal on some channels  Love the small touches around the room including the free mobile phone and electrical equipment to help with ease with lights under floor heating and opening curtains The TV screen amazing bed was super comfortable best hotel in the area hands down ive stay at the Ace Hoxton this is by fair the best

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing really significant and worth mentioning Just some minor points which U shared eith the team  I liked the hospitality The multi national staff from all over are very warm and courteous In India we have a Vedic saying Atithi Devo Bhavo A guest is divine This is rare in today s world but there were glimpses of this

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Underfloor heating didn t work It seems that all the room functionality such as interior lights tv etc being controlled by a single screen device is technology for technology s sake and prone to problems Just finding out the check out time was impossible and in the end had to ring the front desk who take ages to answer but are very good when you re face to face   Clean comfortable and modern with great bed and shower The robes were very squidgy which was great as I spent two days recovering in a darkened room from the eye surgery I d had at Moorfields across the road The low light options were also a bonus for my particular situation

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Expensive breakfast Pretty far from airport Long serving time at the reception   Brand new rooms with very nice modern decor of the rooms Good value for money

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Their were stains on my bed covers when asked to change them they just dropped off the sheets and no one to change them  The bed was extremely comfortable the pool was amazing and the staff was friendly

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Pushing the automation thing a bit much  Classy and modern in the middle of Shoreditch Very lively neighbourhood with lots of place to go out and enjoy

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
