Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Wifi was fast but could always be faster  The one night at M was one of the best I ve had at any London hotel The staff rooms and area was to perfection

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: soundproofing you can here loud and clear what s happening in the hallway or in the room next to you bed if you re tall I m 194 cm 6 4 the standard double bed is going to be to short to sleep comfortably  The facility is really close to Old street underground station Its unusual architecture makes it easy to spot it once you are in the street The facility is very futuristic with beautiful modern interior designs It has a small yet very nice bar on the first floor where you can sit and have some snacks or a glass of wine Standard rooms are large and comfortable with lots of gadgets

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Volume of the tv was very quiet even up all the way Bit too far away to hear it   Bed was very comfortable staff were very attentive hotel was lovely bathroom spotless Nice touches with the electronic pad controlling lights etc

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Details of mini fridge in the rooms we had no menu with the prices   The beds was amazing they was so comfy I have never slept in much a comfy bed before Also the staff was lovely and sorted out having extra things in the room due to the occasion there is no faults as all

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: In the Spa there were no water cups left and no one replaced them whilst we were there The television channel itv b didn t work in our room I rang reception 5 times but couldn t get through around 10pm When I did a repair man who was very polite came and fixed it after about tens minutes but we had missed half the program we wanted to watch In the bathroom there was no shower gel   The room was high tech and the bed extremely comfortable Spa was also great although pool water a little cold

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I booked 4 or 5 rooms for different members of my family Two of the rooms were not allocated properly My relatives were given rooms that were already occupied by other people One set then had to wait over an hour around midnight before an empty room was found for them Both these two sets of guests paid for their rooms but I was also charged for them on my credit card These amounts 163 20 and 178 50 need to be refunded at once I also didn t like the touch screens Olwen Glynn Owen

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I really can t fault anything   This hotel was quite simply awesome The location is superb right by Old Street tube The service was impeccable throughout It was discrete and courteous I d requested a bath on booking com and was upgraded to the most beautiful suite The rooms are so comfortable and quiet everything is controlled from a little iPad I guess some of the best touches were the fact that the hairdryer is great the coffee machine made proper coffee and the robes are soft The staff were just lovely nothing was too much trouble and the spa in the basement was lovely too I travel a lot and this was one of the best nights away from home I have had in a very long time Hats of guys you get a 10

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The view is currently obstructed with construction works going on next door I wasn t sure if it was a pub or bar nearby but it was incredibly noisy Being on the third floor I couldn t believe how I was kept awake till 1am with this loud music   The room was super comfortable and the different light functions were great The room was very clean and located conveniently for sightseeing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: It is a very nice hotel a bit James Bond This also means the rooms were on the dark side furniture and design wise   Very high tech Cool view from my 15th floor room Nespresso in the room Underfloor heating Friendly and helpful staff Great shower

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: No lockers left when using the pool We ordered a taxi through the concierge who didn t tell us it was a minimum 10 fare so we paid 10 for a 6 trip The pool was a bit cold   Fabulous room staff were lovely and a good spa too Lots of great touches in the room everything we needed for a super stay

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Kids under 12 not allowed in the pool perhaps the hotel should consider one hour a day splash time so kids also get their chance   The staff were excllent especially chaelene who really looked after us The bedrooms were fun hi tech and comfortable Club room was great

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Only down side was the tablets on the bedside that control the curtains tv lights etc weren t very reponsive took a while to load   Heated floor in the bathroom was amazing and the heated mirrors that don t get steamed up The even gave us complimentary fruit and cake and a balloon as it was my partners birthday The hotel is amazing an i will definitely be stopping there again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Only a few minor issues The robes weren t in the room on arrival and a few basic toiletries missing Also some of the tv channels didn t work and we had to keep turning the tv off and on   Gorgeous hotel every area was stunning and the staff were great The spa was amazing We really enjoyed our treatments too

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Toilet flush was very weak and didn t work well In the Booking com description we were promised bath robes but there weren t any Slow TV boot up and general control  Great hotel interior VERY comfortable beds Hotel cleanliness was top notch spotless all around Great fridge and snack stock Lots of facilities Love the gadgets

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Such a lovely hotel amazing facilities the check in staff were so helpful and lovely and very welcoming the staff in the bar are not so nice which is the only downfall and the TV kept losing signal but overall it s in a good location I will definitely be going back

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Great hotel great price but i am sorry the pillow smelled sweat maybe the sheets too we were too tired to made complaint and the booking was for one night

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The room controls on one side of the bed where frozen and didn t work The controls where sometimes too slow to respond  The bed was extra comfortable The size of the room was perfect

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: This time it felt less warm and exclusive than in my previous stays in this hotel unfortunately On the SPA centre details dear hotel staff please check glass walls of the saunas they are very dirty far from a 5 hotel level

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: All the staff were very friendly and helpful and the room was very clean and tidy Very close to old street tube station which was very handy for moving around London

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Ordered fries on room service and it came to 8 very good fries none the less but wasn t too impressed with the price of them   From the minute we arrived we were handed the best glass of prosecco I have ever had room was fabulous spa was lovely little bit on the small size but so clean and relaxing none the less Highly recommend this hotel don t think you could have a bad experience if you tried Would defiantly go back

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Room was hi tech All lights curtains and even ground heating is controlling by led screens Bed was awesome All personel always smiling I recommend M by Montcalm to everyone

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Everything in the room lights AC curtains Do Not Disturb indicator is controlled by a tablet There were three in the room but one didn t work The whole system rebooted once in the middle of the night which brought all the lights on And one evening the system froze so that I couldn t even turn the lights on It s a neat idea but obviously has some bugs   Super clean and modern hotel Great location near a tube stop in a quirky neighborhood Lots of restaurants and clubs around Sky lounge with nice city views

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: check in staff wasn t friendly as i expected different rate currency with my booking pounds to dirhams   comfortable room bed clean technology wi fi speed all was perfect

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The architecture creates a very high tech fasade and esthetically that is pleasant to look at from the outside but for the staying guest the rooms get very small windows and it can be suphocating The Samsung TV did not work properly it was often freezing screen The Spa stuff lacked organization and one had the feeling that they were not communicating well with the reception stuff I found the hotel room prize did not match the quality even if the quality was good for the most iPad is Ok but iPad to switch on and off every light not necessary   Good location helpful stuff good bed quality relaxed atmosphere chic architecture in an up and coming neighborhood Good proximity to Old Street station gives easy transportation Very helpful city guide I Phone in the room a big bonus but the concierge was very good too

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Fabulous hotel nothing was too much trouble the staff were so helpful The room was modern everything was controlled remotely even the curtains It was clean and very spacious for London Fresh coffee available in the rooms quality bath robes and toiletries everything you needed and more Having arrived too early to check in we left our bags with the concierge before going off for the day to see a show Old Street tube station is literally a one minute walk from the front door On return we were greeted by name and advised everything was ready for us and that our luggage was in the room waiting We enjoyed great cocktails during happy hour before going out for the evening There are great local restaurants all within walking distance from the hotel we ate at 100 Hoxton Breakfast the following morning was good quality with plenty of choice We looked out from the 16th floor over the sights of London and St Pauls Cathedral It was a relaxed affair there was no rush for us to eat and get out I would say this hotel is great value for money and would highly recommend if you want somewhere special to stay in London I really look forward to staying again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: This hotel is trying too hard to reach the 5 stars level but it looked more like a 4 stars hotel I would not rate it more than 4 stars There were a few things which we disliked 1 the bed was very uncomfortable there is an extra mattress put on top of the 2nd mattress which is very bad for the back and very wavy we had to remove it in order to sleep 2 the idea of having ipads to control the lights is stupid especially since the ipads are always on at night they are showing the clock and cannot be turned off so again very difficult to sleep with the ipads light next to your head at night   The location was good close to the metro stop Old Street

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The TV is slow and not responsive Half for the channels are not in English I expected a bit more from a 5 star hotel   The bed was very comfy and the room layout was something different which I liked The technology within the room was very good

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Reception stated we were upgraded when we complained about very low sink in bathroom Sink is apparently for handicapped people but is not convenient when standing Answer did not make sense Besides fridge and online room service order system not working   Room and location great Very fair price

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: No early check in After requesting then having to wait for the room for 2 hours Could have told us it s a definite no early check in   Fabulous little hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Had to call reception four times to resolve TV issue and was told each time they would call back They didn t The jacuzzi at the spa wasn t working   Bed and shower was good quality

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The guy that checked us in didn t explain everything clearly to us where everything was etc The room was freezing cold at night had to call reception to heat it up and it then still didn t get warm until the next morning And for a 5 star hotel there should of been a mirror in the lift It s more of a 4 star hotel I would say   Loved the spa it was beautiful And the surprise birthday balloons and cake the hotel staff left in the room for our birthday stay And the champagne you got when you arrived on entrance Was really nice Miss the mornings at the spa was really nice

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The beds were really comfortable the staff were really helpful and friendly I loved the sky bar and the surrounding area was full of great bars and restaurants I would definately stay here again as I thought it excellent value for money

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Staff were superb Hotel was fantastic The staff made it a special stay by surprising us with balloons birthday cake in the room on our arrival What a wonderful gesture I would definitely recommend the hotel and will stay there again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I didn t like the staff knocking at my door asking if everything was fine It could be asked by phone instead   The bed was comfortable and all the room modern

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: slippery floor in swimming pool and lack of robes and towels lack of complimentary snacks in room was unable to connect to the wifi  bed was super comfy breakfast was visibly freshly prepared and served with extra care great selection of food technology in the room was brilliant atmosphere was excellent

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Sadly the technology lets this hotel down They seem to be going through quite a problem with it I ve stayed twice now and it s been a major problem both times TV didn t work properly this time and didn t work at all the last time i stayed Had to move rooms because the room controls for lights etc on the panel in the wall didn t work There are no normal light switches the whole room is controlled dependent on wall panel technology and bedside tablets ipads which also suffers from a time lag when you tap it and is not user friendly Staff were fantastic in trying to compensate for the inconvenience but there is sadly only so much they can do even the IT maintenance guys They outsource the hotels TV and room controls etc and it is this company that needs to be changed sort it out sacked

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Small reception area can get a littlie bit crowded if busy  Hospitality at its highest level modern rooms good location and most importantly great value

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I t s my fourth time in the hotel and a little incentive would have been nice  Had waffles and they were just made which is hard to get Also had egg royals which were amazing and their bread very nice choice of sourdough etc Being French I am quite demanding in regards to food

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast was ok but not great We got it free which was so so so kind of them but I wouldnt have paid 25 for it   Room was amazing Location was great Free apples lol

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Pool didn t open till 8am on Sunday but understandable really Security was not used in lifts although key pads were installed for use   Welcome drink on a Saturday arrival Very comfy bed and good block out curtains Amazing spa and pool with nice touches of heated floors and chilled water in jug at spa Great city views from 16th floor bar Walking distance from tube station

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Using the spa with approx 7 people taking constant selfies and photos in the spa area It s quite a small area so we were aware we were in quite a number of their pictures in our swimwear It was really uncomfortable We didn t realise until afterwards that they are banned but despite staff walking through constantly they never told anyone to put them away Also I stayed two weeks in a row The first week there was no robes in the room The second quite a lot of the toiletries which had been there the first week weren t there Plus we had to wait 30 mins after check in for our room and it still wasn t even ready We had to be allocated a different room   The hotel was in a good location for bars and restaurants The staff were lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The shower could ve been a tiny bit more powerful but it was alright And maybe a birthday message from the hotel would ve been nice on the day of my birthday Didn t think I d have to request it   Just about everything The bed was the most comfortable thing I d ever felt

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The TV didn t have many of the basic channels also the connection kept going The pool facilities was too busy full of young people making too much noise Also we had a treatment in the spa the room they put us in was near the reception which was no problem however the amount of noise the staff were making outside the door laughing i didn t get a chance to enjoy my treatment   The room was amazing the bed was one of the most comfortable i ve slept in The equipment they have to control the facilities in the rooms are fabulous you don t even need to step out of the bed to close the curtains

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast at the hotel is disappointing yet expensive However there are plenty of eateries nearby   The hotel is very nice new and modern All the facilities were great Everything in the room is controlled by a pad even opening the curtains A complimentary phone is provided giving free calls including international calls and web browsing You can take it out with you too to act as a city guide with maps Fab To add to that a glass of prosecco and chocolate dipped strawberries are provided as you arrive It is located near Old Street underground station only two stops away from Kings Cross ST Pancras

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Both check in on Friday afternoon was pretty chaotic with only 2 people initially on the desks and several concierges asking you questions adding to the confusion Suggest more reception staff and fewer concierges Saturday morning check out looked dreadful with 15 20 in multiple queues but the team did move this through well to be fair At the moment the hotel is next to a building site Due to excellent double glazing you don t hear much but our room on 15 floor looked almost eye to eye with the crane driver Something to be cautious about in the morning   The huge rain water head shower in the bathroom was amazing and easy to use and the wash basin is designed with space all the way round it to put out toiletries and wash bags etc which so often is a problem in newer hotels Very quiet and comfortable hotel despite the building site next door and the 12 noon check out is welcome at the weekend The cocktail selection in Tonic and Remedy was brilliant with some fascinating twists on standards like Manhattans and Aperol Spritz and the service in the bar was extremely professional and friendly

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The digital TV channels remote control were not talking to each other very well   Very modern fresh feel Staff very friendly and helpful The continental breakfast option is served in a cool lounge looking over the roof tops

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Lack of hooks in the spa facilities for robes and towels cocktail selection in the bar were limited   Spa facilities robes and slippers in the room Under floor heating in the bathroom

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: This was my first time coming to this hotel and I must say it is fantastic when I was coming in to check in there was a queue but the staff apologies and gave as a glass of champagne I didn t have to wait long and the check in was very fast When I saw my room I was very happy with everything look good and the bed was so Comfortable unfortunately I didn t go to the spa so I couldn t experience how it was Overall this hotel is beautiful and amazing and I will definitely come back here with my panther and try out the spa and thank you and your staff for Making us feel welcome I had the best weekend ever

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Pillows could had been firmer covers were all over the place room was too hot and the spa is always fully booked when the whole trip was for the spa but disappointed  The design of the building

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The wait for toast could ve been better they should let customers do their own Also the mushrooms and tomatoes should be kept away from the bacon and sausages as people were using the same tong to pick everything However because everything else was superb this was not enough to downgrade the hotel in general   The bed was amazingly comfortable I felt like booking an extra day The spa facilities the hot stone massage again amazing The hotel was gorgeously looking nice bright very modern The staff were very friendly right from the moment I stepped in the concierge offered to take my bag bubbly was offered at the desk the gentleman that checked me in gave me a nice room on the 15th floor because it was my husband s birthday All in all it was a very enjoyable stay my husband loved his surprise

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: On this occasion there were not enough toiletries in the bathroom No conditioner at all And no macaroons to great me But this is very minor and all I can find fault with   I enjoyed everything about my stay and regularly return to Montcalm The spa is wonderful staff courteous and the beds super comfy

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Lack of parking but it is London and the TV was a little bit on the slow side but nothing that would detract from the stay at all really   Very well presented good location and very polite welcoming staff Room was very clean and in room facilities were appreciated Bed was very comfortable with the array of lighting options very useful

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I normally go to Montcalm for relaxation and luxury with great value for money I love to spend time in the spa this time round I took my son I booked via booking com and did not see anything in the comments about Spa age limits I have been to montcalm before and seen children in the pool so thought this was not an issue on the first night of our stay my son and I went swimming he is such a good boy aged 10 the next day we went to go and use the spa and I was told he was not allowed to enter when asked his age I told them 10 they told me he was under age This was very disheartening as my main reason for stay is to use the spa facilities my son was upset as he was allowed to use the spa the night before with no questions asked I think the hotel need to be more clear on there spa limitations especially for people who travel to this hotel as families   I love Montcalm and I stay there often This time round I had the best room ever it was bigger than ones I have had before with amazing view and huge windows I love the spa as this is the highlight of my stay

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: N A  The room was immaculate spacious and well equipped I had the best night sleep the bed was so comfy The hotel itsself had stunning decor throughout I loved that we got free access to the spa the spa was small but beautiful and enough It was really lovely All the staff were so welcoming and friendly they couldn t have been anymore helpful We highly recommend this hotel and we ll definitely be going back in the future

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Though the high tech gadgets were kind of cool they didn t always function that well I struggled quite a bit with setting the air con to the right temperature and turning off the lights and I m normally quite tech savvy A big issue was that the display on the various gadgets wasn t very sensitive responsive Still a cool idea though   The bed was amazing and the decor was a real plus

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: They have introduced a smartphone in the room with free Wi Fi etc to take out with you during the day great idea However it was not charged when we got to the room and did not work once charged Brilliant idea if the handset was functional   Room with tablet control is amazing and spa facilities are lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Rude reception staff On arrival I was asked Why are you here in a very unfriendly manner The whole check in process was cold and uncomfortable   Really lovely room and gorgeous spa area

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Only one thing the wardrobes were very dark and could have done with some lights  The hotel exceeded our expectations it was fantastic Location was great Will definitely stay here again and already have been recommending to friends

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The upstairs restaurant had a very limited menu ended up going out for dinner but theres plenty of choice nearby  Extremely comfortable bed and such a clean luxury room with a lovely bath

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The room has a lot of shiny black surfaces that show every mark and fingerprint In general I don t like rooms with lots of shiny black because you can see all the previous guests marks No matter how good housekeeping is at the cleaning job its impossible to get black shiny surfaces perfectly clean The room service was a problem at first with a guy on the phone who was absolutely clueless The room service menu was in transition so 4 things on the menu were no longer offered But the head chef could not have been nicer and corrected the problem pronto Very nice guy   The suite was nice and quite large The view was great The bed was very comfortable The special disco colour lighting was funny but of course I tried every colour The hotel staff was very nice and in general helpful and accomodating But I felt some of them are still in training The concierge for example recommended a restaurant in the neighbourhood that had just 2 stars on Yelp Not a good call on his part All said I would return to the M

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Everywhere was exceptionally clean and modern The spa was beautiful We were warmly welcomed both days and couldn t be more thankful for a lovely birthday stay

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: no onsite parking They have a few spaces at the side of the hotel which are always taken There are two ncp car parks but only one is 24 hour which is the one we had to use and was 55 a night   Hotel overall was exceptional You get champagne on arrival and the concierge is very helpful The hotel room had gadgets that allowed you to turn off change lights tv etc and bathroom had under floor heating Very clean and modern

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The spa changing facilities females were too small no hooks to put your stuff not enough benches no one cleaning up towels on the floor excess water everywhere no mirrors other than by the sinks This is one and only critisism of our stay   Staff very friendly and attentive facilities really good room was amazing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The property s decor was very modern and great to look at and the facilities were great The bed was very comfortable to sleep in I would stay again Overall i was very impressed

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Our pillows were too soft for our liking and the waterfall shower wasn t that powerful   Hotel was very modern and staff were very helpful and friendly We used the spa which is open to all guests Our mattress was extremely comfortable and breakfast was delicious

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: silly touch screens instead of lightswitches and couple of bits of poor service let the place down slightly still liked and would consider a return if necessary   nice room overall ideally located for our particular needs on this trip

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: All good aside of Expensive cocktails  Staff were extremely helpful especially the general manager Facilities excellent Rooms exceptional and cleanliness great Cocktails a little too pricey so maybe look at options of promotions so that guests stay in the bar

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Room 1519 smells a tad like old cigarette smoke which the air freshener did not completely mask There was a weird incessant thump thump thump noise in the room when I stayed there   Location is good Guys at concierge are very friendly and helpful Room is fairly spacious modern and well appointed

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The tv could have had better signal but otherwise everything was great   The spa was amazing so was the bed All the staff were friendly and helpful Prosecco on arrival and departure was great I loved it all even the room was very upgraded

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast buffet is not what I am used to in hotels that level and price   Size of rooms stylish fit out great SPA and very good sky view restaurant and frindly staff

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast could have been a bit better and not have taken the juice away first when tidying up as I wanted something to drink just before I left breakfast   The hospitality of the staff in making the weekend special for my partners birthday and were very accommodating

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: On arrival the receptionist was rather rude he made a fuss about payment as though my card had declined when in fact his wireless keypad was losing signal and the transaction was made several times  Gym and leisure facilities were lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: There are several missing tiles in the steam room Not a good look Internet was often slow odd for a tech hotel We put the clean room sign on twice in one day but housekeeping never came Soap dish in room 407 chipped in 3 places and clearly needs to be replaced but hasn t Brightness level on TV way too dark The heat produced by the mini bar is quite high and tends to warm up the snacks on the shelf on top of it melting those made with chocolate Temperature controls on the bathroom panel very confusing The tablets and room control panels in the room were laggy and often unresponsive If your hotel claims to specialise as a tech hotel it needs to work flawlessly The Eccleston Square Hotel near Victoria where we stayed 3 years ago has mastered the use of in room technology It is better integrated and you can do many more things from your in room tablet Maybe time for a research trip M Hotel   Excellent value for money For international travellers there is a smartphone you can take with you with data included to help you navigate and make the most of the city Location in zone 1 London 3 mins away from a tube station Check in time is at 2 and check out is at 12 This is exceptionally good for a large hotel Most hotels need 3 4 hours turnaround instead of 2 Nice sky lounge on top floor with lovely views Big TV in room Absolutely 0 light pollution from curtains Pillows very comfortable No noise complaints even with a vast amount construction going on next door Hotel is new so most things are in good condition Beds huge even in entry level rooms Large sized rooms well above average for London Room service very fast Gentleman in charge of downstairs bar extremely friendly and knowledgeable Thank you for a great stay Would definitely stay here again and would recommend to others

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: staff were polite but could have been more friendly  The bed was really comfy and the room was to a very high standard very clean and very modern would definitely recommend and will return

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Although the tablets were cool and modern they didn t turn off properly at night so it took a bit longer to get to sleep at night Also heating took a while to heat up but when it was it was great   Everything was clean we loved the spa facilities and the room was cool using the tablets to operate everything and the bed was really comfy Staff are always on hand if you need anything Overall our stay was amazing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: For a hotel that charges over 300 per night I was disappointed by several things Most importantly the king sized bed had two mattresses both were of exceptionally poor quality but one of them had s massive hole in the middle after my boyfriend and I sat on it to watch TV for 30 minutes and neither of us are big sized people We couldn t use that side of the bed at all and ended up sleeping on the other side We did not have a good night s sleep which was a key reason I had been willing to pay this amount of money in the first place Secondly the room had no slippers or dressing gowns I d expect this to be standard for a hotel in this price range Lastly the hotel has an elaborate electronic system to control lighting hearing curtains and the TV Impressive at first look until you realize that it s very hard to use and it s impossible to get a light or temperature setting that s actually comfortable It would have been far better if this money had been invested in good quality mattresses   Spa facilities are nice as was the warm welcome by the receptionist however three showers were insufficient and after waiting 10 minutes to use one after my swim I gave up and went back to my room wrapped in towels as the spa didn t have robes available

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Our room wasn t clean after the 1st night we stayed 2 nights Bathrobes were missing and never arrived We had to show the same credit card used to book the room it was a gift by another person we had to call him over embarrassing   It s really 2 minutes far from the tube station

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Live in north west London booked for a romantic night close to the action Awful check in experience ruined our stay I had asked the hotel to allow my partner to check in as she was arriving before me via booking com unfortunately the gentleman on the desk couldn t help her he said he couldn t see the note fair enough but you have my card and you have me on the phone with the booking number etc it s a one night booking and you have the power to charge the card anyway as you would if I hadn t turned up I rushed from the other side of the city only to find my girlfriend sat in the lobby almost an hour later perhaps the hotel could have given her a tea or somewhere to change for our evening out When I talked to the lady who was now on the desk she was baffled as to why the person my partner had dealt with while I was also available on the phone had not just charged the card on file and let her into the room All together the knock on effect was that I had to conduct my business activities planned for Friday afternoon on Saturday meaning that we didn t get to enjoy the facilities we missed our evening reservation at a restaurant in Hoxton and my treat for my other half was essentially ruined by a lack of competency from the man on the front desk The hotel made absolutely no attempt to try to make things right You will see from my other reviews that I am balanced and fair in my feedback   The room was clean one of the cleanest I have ever seen and comfortable The Hotel s location is great

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: TV not good kept streaming and freezing up on the screen Very disappointing considering all the other hi tech stuff The TV has to work Other than that I couldn t fault the hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The check in could have been quicker but it was busy so it was slightly understandable  This hotel had no faults Everything was perfect from the staff to the spa Worth every penny I was given complimentary cupcakes and wine for my birthday such lovely people Thank you for such a pleasant stay xx

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: However this time the attention I received was very poor The check in took very long I asked for a room with separate beds and they asked to wait for them to prepare the room accordingly they proposed us to go to the spa in the meantime we decided to visit London and at the end of the day when I went to my room I realized that they have done nothing The beds were still not separated I called the reception and they told me that my room didn t allow have separate beds I asked then to change room and they told me that the hotel was full at breakfast the waiter was too distracted I had to constantly call him to bring us the coffee the toasts last time I stayed that was done proactively and the clients didn t have to have their hand raised all the time Some of the touch screen on my room don t work which was quite uncomfortable to switch on off lights The spa was not very clean and smelled humidity and the cleaning of my room was also very poor I was recommending this hotel to my work colleagues but definitely I will not recommend this hotel anymore   It s not the first time that I stay in this hotel I like the spa and the confort of the rooms location is also good close to the subway and a lot of bus lines

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Some white stuff all over wardrobe only one dressing gown asked for another It it never arrived super long wait at check in and nobody said sorry  New trendy hotel great bars

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: We went for brunch to the top floor restaurant and they had absolutely nothing for a vegan and weren t even apologetic My friend asked for avocado on toast but everything had cream and butter in I would have expected someone to run downstairs to Sainsbury s for an avocado   Check in is quite long and busy but the free glass of prosecco was a lovely touch We were here for a bridal shower and they sent up a free bottle of prosecco to our room

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Technology in room was poor lighting was slow to respond to the touch pad which was frustrating The Information delivering aspect of the TV led nowhere and as there was no other way of finding out about the spa dining options etc we resorted to googling Just give us an in room brochure for god s sake The staff tried hard but lacked training On arrival we were given a room to discover a different name on the room key folder On informing staff this we waited in the room to be told what to do receiving a phone call to say there was a computer glitch Luckily we didn t avail ourselves of the facilities as another couple arrived and let themselves in the room shocking for them and us On arriving at the breakfast area we were not offered tea or coffee for ages This happened both mornings Despite our full English breakfast being included in the price we paid I was told that if I wanted porridge that would be 7 extra Yes I could have had ham cheese pastries as well as cooked breakfast which looked very nice but the only cereals on offer were bran flakes and special K I then waited 10 minutes after asking 2 staff members for a cereal bowl argh Confusingly 15 floors above us was another breakfast area for those receiving Continental breakfast again not initially explained by staff or room info Unfortunately although this hotel has the potential to be great it was not good enough for five stars and we won t return the quest for the perfect London hotel continues   The room was lovely good comfy bed great shower etc The hotel is in a great location for enjoying East London and still being accessible for the West End and South London which is what we were looking for when visiting family in London

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Noticed the cups in my bathroom had not been changed making me question how thoroughly the room had been cleaned   Extra fluffy comfortable beds Staff very obliging and happy to give me a free room upgrade Spa is amazing complete with a pool sauna steam room and ice room for cooling down Great for beating that London chill

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I couldn t really find anything wrong with the rooms or the stay in the hotel   The bed was extra comfy and the facililties were amazing My favourite thing was how everything was controlled by tablet Staff were really friendly

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Everything in the room is high tech touch pad ultra modern Bed was super comfy shower fabulous Close to subway station so very easy to go anywhere in London Ps they always have a big bowl of apples and oranges on the reception desk

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Staff where unaware of what time the bar closed bar staff and reception poor communication we had to check ourselves as reception didn t have much of a clue when the pool closed either   Beds where comfy facilities are good

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I was never made aware of the fact that if we were to use the mini bar in the room that we had to pay at the end I was confused as to why I paid a fair amount for a room for one night and that the mini bar was not included it needs to be made more clear to guests about the mini bar because it wasn t a nice surprise when it came to leaving the hotel and that I had to pay quite a bit more   The room was amazing and the shower was very very nice Being able to control the lighting from the bed was also a massive bonus The room as a whole was lovely

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The media station didn t work in our room and nobody came to help us even though we asked 4 times One staff member didn t even seem to know what I was taking about when I told her it was nt working Not ideal when it s part of the reason you booked the hotel We also got asked 3 times if we wanted to move to their new hotel in a different location which we didn t and it became annoying being asked I just wanted the room spec to be what it is described as and for things to be working or fixed   The bed was really comfy The electric curtains were a nice touch and I loved the mood lighting The TV is a good size

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: This is a personal preference but the bed was so soft it was uncomfortable What really put me out was that everything was controlled by touch pads There were several in the room that glowed at night enough to bother me Furthermore these did not work properly when I arrived and were only fixed after calling maintenance who restarted the system twice On my third night the power completely went out only in my room and since I couldn t call down I went downstairs and then couldn t get back in the room since the card reader didn t work either Lastly I didn t like paying up front for the entire stay This didn t give me a choice if I wanted to switch hotels or if I was staying with a friend I did book a refundable room   The hotel spa has a nice pool and hot tub It s walking distance to Shoreditch and Liverpool Street

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Some instructions on how to use the technology in the rooms would be a big help   Decor facilities attention to detail The room was well equipped and the bathroom spacious and very comfortable

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Check in was a bit difficult Our daughter paid for the accommodation prior to our arrival Seemed to be an issue and even after copies taken of our passports and a credit card given for further expenses our daughter was required to provide her credit card that she had used and hand it over for an impression plus provide evidence of her identity We were then asked on leaving whether we wanted the accommodation bill to be emailed to us Didn t make us feel like 5 star customers   Excellent facilities

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The chair in the room had some hairs on it which leads me to think maybe it wasn t cleaned properly but that could ve been a minor oversight  The hotel and facilities are very nice The stafff is friendly and accommodating I can t wait to stay here again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The electronic control tablet is hanged out twice during my stay  Actually it was a great experience That was our first time to hear about or try M By Montcalm Surprisingly the hotel facilities particularly the space of room modern decoration and electronic control system quality of food in the room service and restaurants were amazing The staff are so kind particularly Cristina from the front desk and Conceirge guys were so kind The cleanliness was perfect The cost of stay equals the provided services I just want to say Thank you very much for all people there

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Small niggle but the pillows were very uncomfortable would benefit from providing a pillow menu like some other hotels or a least a couple of other spare pillows to accommodate guest needs The touchscreen tablets weren t the most responsive things in your universe which made simple tasks like turning off the lights rather taxing Also lots of building work going on next door so not the greatest immediate view but we could see beyond to the Gerkin from our window As I said only silly niggles   Very modern and impressive building High tech room with features like lights mood lighting curtains and media centre controlled by touchscreen tablets Mobile phone provided for use whilst out and about in London if required Lovely spa facilities Fab views of the city from the bar restaurant Cool location in Shoreditch out of the hustle and bustle of central London but within walking distance of great restaurants and places of interest such as Spitalfields and Brickyard Markets Excellent value for London

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I asked for a drink at the bar was told to sit and my order would be taken I paid 11 50 for one drink plus another 2 table service The most expensive single drink I have ever had Later on in the evening I phoned room service to request an ice bucket about half an hour I called back down to cancel it as it had taken so long On arrival at reception the guy who booked us in wasn t really very friendly he couldn t even bring himself to smile on the website our room apparently had an aroma box which we were able to choose a smell for our room whatever that was but when we asked the guy at the desk he didn t seem to know what we were asking about so we gave up The iPad type controls didn t seem to want to work in our room   Fluffy carpets and super comfy bed Location was excellent

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Full_Review: 2 things 1 Wifi was a bit dodgy at times 2 A c via the tablet control was a bit delayed But both worked great for the most part Other than that amazing   I booked this hotel last minute after an Airbnb fell through It is the best hotel I have stayed in anywhere and will be my new got in London Here are some reasons why Location Shoreditch is an awesome up and coming area of London surrounded by great food and a great night life Trendy hipster and authentic people abound Nespresso machine in room Free top line coffee in room each morning with biscuit Perfect after a Shoreditch night Fully automated room controlled by tablet All lights A C tv curtains are controlled by a tablet both at the front of the room and in your bed Forget to hit a light before getting in bed No worries Handy telephone provided Hotel provided a cell equipped with 3G capabilities to use around the city for free Amazing for international travelers trying to get around without data service beautiful facilities for good price The size of the room and bathroom and quality of all was amazing considering a price around 200 Incredible deal

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: My partner and I had another lovely stay in M by Montcalm while we celebrated his birthday I let the hotel know in advance that it was a special occasion and when we arrived we found our room had been upgraded and lots of special touches added Adorable As normal our room was not only clean and comfy but huge too We re a big fan of the way everything can be controlled by the tablets and love how everything you could need is available in the room already We also made sure to take advantage of the pool and spa which is a really brilliant addition On top of that the hotel is in such a handy location meaning we were never far away from where we wanted to be We couldn t have been happier with our stay and will be back sooner than later

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Room service Not top notch but the hotel were very apologetic and made an amendment to my bill   The architecture of the building is amazing I liked the fact that there was a pool and spa but didn t get up early enough to use it

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Old street underground being closed Can t fault the hotel at all  Great staff very friendly Electric curtains were a nice feature The hotel is also an amazing building which added to the experience

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The fried breakfast was a little dry as it was buffet but hey no big deal I simply went back and got myself an extra delicious croissant   We have stayed at quite a few hotels in London which were all very nice However M by Montcalm was by far the best I like to treat my partner to a London break every now and then but some hotels just feel wrong No matter how glorious they are for us it s all about how you feel M by Montcalm made us feel great Like meeting an old friend again We will definitely go back The staff were superb all round and upgraded our room simply because the room was available The room was great with fantastic views across London However I am really intreaged to see the views from the point at the front of the hotel Next time we visit we would like to stay two nights and eat in the hotels 17th floor restaurant as well as we did in Hoxton again The location is perfect for a young couple as its in the heart of trendy Shorditch with lively bars restaurants coffee shops and night clubs at your feet with luxury when you return back to the hotel Literally can not fault this hotel M by Montcalm is perfect

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Pillows are way to soft I kept waking up At first think they questioned whether I was in the right place possibly because my hair was a little wild from my spa So at first I did feel a little uncomfortable But once we got talking everything was fine and from there on out it was a wonderful stay   Staff were very attentive and very smiley Everything is super clean which I love It was peaceful and quite homey you were instantly comfortable in your room Just loved it

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Check in took 10 minutes Last time I stayed at a Premier Inn it took 10 seconds and cost 10 of the price The room was connected via tablets and an Android powered interface none of it worked I couldn t have a shower when I arrived because I couldn t turn the bathroom light on An engineer was sent to fix it In the middle of the night it cut out again stopping the aircon and causing me a hot uncomfortable night s sleep There were no instructions on how to use the phone Reception didn t answer when I called Then when I finally got hold of them they didn t know if they offered a pressing service It s a real shame and somewhat ironic that the flagship hotel of London Tech City as they proudly brand their gowns can t provide technology that works To compound it all although admittedly not their fault there is a huge construction site next door and I was awoken at 9am on a Saturday by hammering and drilling Overall a very disappointing and expensive experience   In theory this is a smashing hotel A gorgeous building and modern to a fault Unfortunately in reality it is a great concept badly executed The room service was excellent however

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Small problems with room key not letting us in I returned about 9 keys by the end of my stay bathroom light in triple room stopped working in night expected as the hotel is so technical and everything controlled by ipad including lights and curtains It was a little strange to have an electrician in the room at 8am to fix the lights but we were given another room while he worked During our issues the staff were very helpful apologetic and professional I requested an Upgrade for breakfast for my party and this was granted Parking is an issue There was a maximum stay of 3 or 4 hours but it was really Expensive The night before was fine as we parked on a Sunday but moved the car to a pay and display bay on Monday morning Next time I wouldn t drive unless Saturday to Sunday but all of the above would not prevent me from returning I m not sure what standard double rooms are like I imagine they re quite plain as I think we were moved to one when we had the lighting issue My suite was plain but had all I needed so I can imagine a simple double would be even plainer I would recommend a club room as a minimum room as it pays due to the voucher and possibility of a free upgrade One of my favourite hotel stays and I stay in about 10 a year or maybe I was excited for my first girls night away   Beautiful clean modern hotel with polite staff Beautiful place to to stay We booked a double room and a triple room Double room was upgraded to a king suite which was beautiful Both rooms had Hermes bathing products and robes Upon check in I had a call to the suite to ask if all was ok and was brought up 5 cupcakes and a bottle of alcohol maybe because I mentioned it was my birthday Also we were given a 20 Pound voucher per person per room to use in the casual lounge upstairs As there were 5 of us we spent nothing that night As we had fish and chips or burgers in the lounge fish and chips recommended When I looked at this hotel online I was not too sure about the location or facilities but you have to see it to believe it it is lovely Views are of the local city and mostly traffic but rooms and facilities were really good so views did not matter to me and I pay a premium for good views usually I went for the spa and it was lovely a small pool and jacuzzi but ample space for the people who visited Behind the pool is a dry steam room and wet steam room with showers I think there s also a gym which I didn t get the time to use There is a relaxation room in the spa area with a few lounge chairs I feel it was very Cosey and fresh cold water was available I would however say that me sister and I accidentally went into the mens Changing room as there is a faint Image of a man and a woman our bad I suppose Montcalm is really good overall and I loved it and I will return I originally found out about this hotel on a friends social media and instantly enquired about it Website doesn t do the hotel justice it s amazing As explained with the vouchers and upgraded breakfast we spent very little for our 1night stay

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing major prices for room service were a little high but that s understandable as it s London city   I m so happy to have booked this hotel had a fantastic stay The staff were really pleasant and helpful while checking me in The room was lovely extremely clean and well presented Everything is controlled on ipads which was really fun you could customize quite a bit with the lighting curtains and room temperature underfloor heating etc The bed was extremely comfortable and we both slept really well The bathroom was spotless and the shower was great the Elemis products were a nice extra The location was great too the underground is right outside and it s also cheap enough to get a cab after hours Overall you could really see the quality in the room from the full size hairdryer to the high quality selection of teas will definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: It s a fun hotel in a hip part of town but doesn t deserve 5 star rating We ve got the last minute deal via booking com The staff was friendly but we clearly caused a lot of problems They were unaware of the late check out for geniuses offer and obviously weren t taking our word for it it wasn t easy to find on the confirmation email but we managed in the end It was the longest check in process we ve ever had we ve cleared the transatlantic security quicker than that They made a copy of my passport an impression of my credit card the room was already paid for then we were asked to fill in the registration form and again for the the credit card and pin to pre authorise any spending on the card The design is great but then they clearly tried to save on builders everything is is assembled rather cheaply Bits don t necessarily match and there s glue visible between the parts of the design features The lights in a hallway and in in the club bar are flickering There was a 3 inch gap between blackout curtains and the wall next to the head board so you wake up at 7am with bright light shining onto your face whereas the rest of the room is relatively dark   Location design

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Nothing   Fantastic hotel in a great location beautiful contemporary decor excellent spa comfortable clean high tech rooms and wonderful staff Minutes walk from some great restaurants and bars in Shoreditch and a couple of minutes from Old Street tube station would definitely stay again Thoroughly enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I was originally given the wrong room to the type I had booked It wouldn t have mattered but I specifically paid more for a twin room rather than a double The staff were quick to respond and move me but also did admit that all they do anyway is separate the beds which takes them about 5 minutes so that s what I paid extra for Interesting Also there were out of date crisps in our mini bar which in my opinion is totally unacceptable There was also an issue with a pre paid amount for extra drinks and food whilst you are there The bar told me I need to pay as I hadn t made this pre paid arrangement They even rang down to reception who confirmed this As it turned out I had paid and again it was their mistake When I complained about the above issues the guy on reception seemed to find it fairly amusing and smirked Not really 5 behaviour or service I m afraid   The room was nice Very clean and spacious The shower was amazing The gym was better than most hotel gyms

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I booked this for a 40th birthday treat and it really didn t dissapoint We got upgraded to a junior suite on arrival with cakes and a balloon which was a nice surprise There was fresh water and fruit in the room The room was lovely The bed was so comfortable and the bathroom was spotless with an amazing rain shower Loved all the technology We did come back to our room one afternoon and the card to open the door wouldn t work but other than that no problems Breakfast was fantastic Such a lovely choice of food All the staff were very helpful and polite One of the best hotels I ve stayed in for a long time We also got engaged on my birthday so this made it an even extra special time for us which I will always associate with staying in this hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: On arrival had a pint of Heineken and a glass of prosseco somewhat shocked at bill of over 19 there are far better bars close by that charge significantly less

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Breakfast is not great hardly and choice And not hot either there is no toast at the buffet have to ask the waiter so while ur waiting the food gets cold Had a drink at the sky bar did not know they added service charge onto the bill lucky i brought abit extra change out The area the hotel is in is not the best you can jump on the train if need be Would help if there was instructions for coffee machine in the room Also a speaker with usb ports but didnt have a clue how to work it   Staff at the hotel are extremely friendly even just walking around u are greeted When we arrived we had rose petals and balloons in the room as it was a occasion Very nice touch Also macaroons Bottled water and fruit Spa area was very clean and there is a fridge where u can help your self to water and fruit Locker keys and towels are also given once down there A short time after arriving house keeping came round to see if we needed anything but we were fine Under Heating floor in the bathroom is nice but takes a while to get going The room is basically controlled by the tablet ours switched off but someone soon came to fix it

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Bar staff and staff in the restaurant were sometimes slow and inconsistent in their level is service The bar was table service but this was slow and frustrating and I would ve preferred to just go to the bar   The reception staff were lovely and welcome and staff were generally attentive The rooms are lovely with lots of mod cons

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: 26 each for breakfast even in London that is a joke   Spa pool And the technology in the rooms Also an arrival call from guest experience was lovely and they gave us cupcakes and wine as it was a special occasion

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Big unit over the tv causes a lot of glare on the screen due to extra layer of glass Can t see the point of it apart from it makes the tv look like a giant iPad   Friendly staff great location for getting to Alley Pally and central London great high tech room with nesspresso coffee machine very bouncy carpets very clean

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Reservation made via Booking com with usual personal details submitted online and secured via the company Credit Card I was then asked for photographic ID during the Check in process When the receptionist was questioned on the need for ID she was unable to give me a reasoned argument and then suggested that it was just part of the process they had to follow A little concerning given the amount of personal data exchanged by simply checking in to that hotel I was then told that payment was required on arrival as the booking was secured via Booking com which was not a problem but I was then informed that I couldn t use my personal card because pre authorisation had already been made via the company card and which was taken prior to me even arriving at the hotel In addition After declining the 50 pre authorisation per night I was abruptly told that I could not use the mini bar My entire experience of the hotel was tainted within 15 20mins of arrival It is disappointing that the hotel cannot replicate their local competitors customer experience Perhaps less of a security grilling and more a warm welcome would be more appropriate   Comfortable room with a view

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I thought 28 for breakfast was excessive so went around the corner and had a full English for 5 95 I also couldn t find anything in the room about wifi access or passwords etc for that price I expected this to be free and obvious   I loved the touch controls in the room once I understood them

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I can t think of anything I didn t like   The effort the staff made to make our anniversary special really made our stay they put balloons rose petals and macaroons in our room for us to enjoy The spa was lovely and very clean all the staff were friendly and wished us a happy anniversary The breakfast was great also a nice selection

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Full_Review: I was greeted by the staff and told to pay for my room upon arrival I do not think I have been asked for payment in advance usually a bill at the end of the stay Didn t make it feel very 5 I did not know that I would have to pay an additional 50 00 charge just in case I decided to eat or drink some items from the bar in my room I told them I did not intend to take anything from the mini bar nor eat at the hotel so therefore I did not want to pay I was then told the mini bar would be emptied and good enough someone came to empty it Not very trusting of your guests I wasn t made aware of this when booking the room   Location to where I was working

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Everything was great the receptionnists waiters at the restaurant employees of the hotel were very pleasant and efficient wonderful location

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: I had lunch one day The restaurant was very quiet and the menu was limited Perhaps these things are related   As on my previous visit the staff were pleasant helpful and welcoming That to me more than anything makes for a good hotel

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff let the experience down Their English wasn t good enough so I had to repeat myself everytime that I spoke to someone which grew really tiring The food at breakfast was good but the organisation of it was awful Staff didn t know who d been seated where spilt coffee over guests and I had to ask for some toast three times one morning With the right staff it could have been a perfect trip   Facilities and rooms were amazing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: If you need to sleep in complete darkness take an eye mask The ipads on the wall which control the lights in the room glow at night also there s light bleeding in from the hallway and on the TV and clock so annoying if you struggle to sleep with lights on They take the payment for the room twice Once on booking com and once on arrival so be aware of this The release the payment 3 days after you check out   The room was lovely and the spa facilities were great You get a robe and slippers plus all the essentials you need The coffee machine was a nice touch and the view across London was awesome The shape of the building is so unusual and the gin bar downstairs is also amazing

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: There was nothing I didn t like   Everything The decor the style the amazing staff The birthday cake they put in our room complimentary The best nights sleep I have ever had All the extras in the room My partner was so impressed with the tablet controlled curtains opening and the size of the tv The bathrobes and slippers A great price for a central London 5 star hotel so close to an underground station We were at the shard in 10 minutes

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: One member of staff that we checked in with was very Unhelpful and very grumpy clearly didn t want to be there His english wasn t great and didn t tell us where to go for breakfast what time it finished etc maybe I should of asked other than that cant fault the place   Excellent facilities room was amazing touch screen gadgets are cool look after baggage even after you check out I know some hotels can be funny about that breakfast was amazing lots of variety and friendly waiters waitresses 2 3 min walk from Tube Lots of pubs clubs local for a 5 star for tghis price I will be going back again Thank you

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The mattress topper was smaller than the mattress the pillows were too soft The room hadn t been cleaned thoroughly there were nuts under the bed dust on the desk grime around the shower base These are only minor complaints we have already booked our return stay   Loved the technology there was a wide variety of soft drinks alcohol snacks in the mini bar The coffee machine was a nice surprise

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: Just parking facilities would be great  Facilities and staff were great and excellent room facilities room was everything you needed for a good nights sleep

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The tech in the rooms played up yet again on this my second visit Why not just have a normal light switch   The location close to Old Street station the trendy Shoreditch is perfect with free on street parking right outside the hotel on weekends

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The curtain was broken in our room and would not close properly I had to ring down for our luggage as this was not in our room We had a full English Breakfast included in the price and when we went to the restaurant on Sunday Morning a lady member of staff told us we had not booked and paid for the breakfast and did we want to wait somewhere quiet I felt very embarrassed in front of everyone one in the restaurant I showed her my booking and she said she still didn t have us booked in Everyone else they escorted to a table but not us We did eventually get our breakfast Without an apology for the embarrassment they caused us This was a special stay as we were celebrating my Husbands 50th birthday I will not be recommending this hotel or staying there again   location didn t think it was 5 star

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: The staff We had been told when we checked in the hotel that the pool is open from 8AM till 9PM we made sure we got back to our hotel at 8PM so we could have an hour or so in the pool we got in the lift to go downstairs to the pool the lift always stops half way at nearly EVERY stop on the way down as someone else will press the button finally we got the pool and the lady had turned around said oh the last check in was 8 30 and its now 8 32 HOW RUDE IS THAT 2 minutes I was more than shocked We had recently spent two nights at the shard Shangri La hotel the night before and decided we wanted to stay another 2 nights in London so we stupidly chose this place never again We were allowed to go into the Shangri La hotel sky pool even 5 minutes before it closes so why the hell did it matter if we were 2 minutes late because of their stupid lifts I complained to the lady all we got offered was a complimentary free drink Which we did not want We wanted her to turn around just let us in the pool for 20 minutes The next day we got breakfast room service in our room which was amazing But the second morning we had ordered it took an hour to come then we didn t even get a choice of which toast brown white Scrambled egg fried which we got offered the first morning The guy then came into our room with the breakfast had said oh I came in at 7 this morning and I had to make your hot chocolates myself which was NO excuse to us And the drinks were cold as an ice drink when we checked out we where then CHARGED for room service but our breakfast was included They had also charged me 127 deposit without even letting me know Luckily I checked my bank statement I had to even call up a few days later to make them refund it to me as it took 5 days From going to the shard to this hotel was the worst mistake of my life   The room was very modern absolutely beautiful Also the pool and the spa on the ground floor was so lovely

Full_Review: Everything is ran off of a tablet which sounds cool but I can assure you it s faster to hit a switch than to tap the screen find the light you want and turn it on The tablets never actually turn off so they are kind of a pain to sleep next to They try to make the rooms smell real good by putting some aroma therapy box but it s REAL strong and we had to have it removed from the room as it was way to overwhelming With all the technology the room has to offer the TV has no tv guide after a long day touring London we had to flip through every single channel to find what we wanted to watch Super annoying   It was close to the underground The pool and hot tub were nice The bed was super comfortable

Full_Review: The view wasn t great as opposite was a building being built we didn t mind though as we was too busy sight seeing during the day   The staff were really friendly and did everything they could to make you feel special and make your time there as great of an experience as possible Theodora was the receptionist who signed us in when she found out it was a special occasion our room was upgraded she was very helpful The hotel room was amazing the rooms are spacious and everything is high tec We had a few problems with the lights kept on going off as everything is controlled by a tablet but we rang reception and was fixed within minutes Very close to Old Town station so in Central London within minutes I would 100 recommend this hotel to anyone who would like to make there stay as relaxing as possible in the busy city of London The spa is also worth a visit great atmosphere and very clean facilities We didn t buy breakfast but we wish we did when we booked it as could of got it for much cheaper Great hotel in a great location

Hotel_Name: M by Montcalm Shoreditch London Tech City
Full_Review: All small stuff here but things to take note 1 Some of the tech is overkill and has glitches when you just need to simply hit the lights off but this area Shoreditch is known for being a tech hub so its understandable what they are trying to do 2 Also alarm in spa kept going off because they had i big red button in the steam room that people kept pressing thinking it would create more steam Terrible design and I m sure its going to get fixed after the incident 3 Construction is taking place next door so depending on the room it can be noisy 4 Not the hotels fault but there were some rude snobby guests It seems to attract a crowd that thinks they are much cooler than they really are 5 Not really much of a view or open light Windows were slivers but that said it didn t seem to intrude on the comfort and feel of the space   1 Overall Chic cool fun vibe amazing location really new hotel 2 Amenities Overall the spa is very cool waterfall in the pool hot tub saunas chill room etc and comes complimentary to all guests The accents Nespresso machine complimentary teas etc all top notch 3 Room The shower bathroom was elite and modern very comfy bed romantic customizable mood lighting all great 4 Service was also exceptional and manager was extremely accommodating to us
